inventionTitles.title: 种治疗上呼吸道感染的注射液
Injection for treating upper respiratory tract infection

section.content: 本发明公开了种治疗上呼吸道感染的注射液，取下述重量配比的主要原料药制备而成：连翘0.4-1.2，板蓝根0.8-1.6，生石膏0.3-0.6，赛金刚0.6-1.0，旱莲草0.6-1.5。该注射液疗效显著，见效快，不会产生耐药性，经临床验证，具有可重复性。

The invention discloses an injection for treating upper respiratory tract infection, which is prepared from the following main raw medicines in parts by weight: 0.4-1.2 parts of forsythia, 0.8-1.6 parts of isatis root, 0.3-0.6 part of raw gypsum, 0.6-1.0 part of henry hemsleya root and 0.6-1.5 parts of eclipta. The injection is obvious in curative effect and high in effect taking speed and can not generate drug resistance; and through clinical verification, the injection has repeatability.

A kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infectionDivisional application, original applying number 2014106536169, applying date 2014.11.18, the injection of title treatment upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method。

Technical field

The present invention relates to traditional Chinese medicine field, particularly relate to a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof。

Background technology

Upper respiratory tract infection refers to the acutely inflamed general name between nasal cavity to throat, is modal infectious disease。These disease four seasons, any age all can fall ill, and by containing the virulent spittle, droplet, or the apparatus through polluting is propagated。Often when Abwehrkraft des Koepers reduces, as caught cold, tired, the situation such as drench with rain, the former virus existed or invaded by the external world, or/and antibacterial, mushrooms out breeding, causes infection。Chang Jifa bronchitis, pneumonia, nasal sinusitis, a few peoples can complicated with acute myocarditis, nephritis, rheumatic fever etc.。Upper respiratory tract infection clinical manifestation can be divided into Types Below: one, common cold。Cause for viral infection, be commonly called as " cold "。Onset is relatively anxious, and main manifestations is sniffle, such as sneeze, nasal obstruction, stream clear water sample nasal mucus, it is possible to show as cough, dry pharynx, itching throat or burn feeling even Postnasal drip sense。Two, acute viral pharyngitis and laryngitis。Caused by rhinovirus, adenovirus, influenza virus, parainfluenza virus and enterovirus, respiratory syncytial virus etc.。Clinical manifestation is itching throat and burning sensation, and pharyngalgia is inconspicuous。Cough rare。Acute laryngitis mostly is influenza virus, parainfluenza virus and adenovirus etc. and causes, and clinical manifestation is obvious hoarseness, difficulty speaking, can have heating, pharyngalgia or cough, has sore throat and increase the weight of during cough。Three, acute herpetic angina。How to be caused by CA, show as obvious pharyngalgia, heating。It is mainly in summer, is more common in child, occasionally in adult。Four, acute pharyngo conjunctivitis。Mainly caused by adenovirus, Coxsackie virus etc.。Show as heating, pharyngalgia, photophobia, shed tears, swallow and conjunctiva is substantially congested。Five, acute pharyngoamygdalitis。Pathogen mostly is Hemolytic streptococcus, is secondly hemophilus influenza, streptococcus pneumoniae, staphylococcus etc.。Onset is anxious, and pharyngalgia is obvious, the heat that occurs together, fear of cold, and body temperature is up to more than 39 DEG C。Having a medical check-up and can find pharyngeal obvious hyperemia, antiadoncus, hyperemia, there is yellow purulent secretion on surface。Sometimes with neck submental lymph nodes enlargement, tenderness, and pulmonary haves a medical check-up absence of signs。Six, complication。Small number of patients can complicated with acute sinusitis, otitis media, tracheitis and bronchitis。Upper respiratory tract infection with pharyngitis for performance, some patients can secondary Hemolytic streptococcus cause rheumatic fever, glomerulonephritis etc., small number of patients can intercurrent disease viral myocarditis, should watch out for。Part youngster, owing to there occurs viral myocarditis, causes sudden death, significant。If upper susceptible people occurs that chest is stuffy and should pay close attention to, it is impossible to adopt a casual attitude。

The treatment of upper respiratory tract infection: 1. conventional symptomatic treatment medicine。(1) ipratropium bromide ipratropium bromide spray: placebo-controlled trial proves that, to alleviating watery nasal discharge, sneeze effectively, particularly course of disease early stage begins to use on the 1st day。Main adverse reaction is the band blood streak in 15%～20% patient's mucus tears。(2) pseudoephedrine: act on respiratory mucosa alpha-adrenergic receptor, alleviates nasal mucosa congested, and heart and other peripheral blood vessel alpha-receptor effects is very micro-。Alleviate nasal obstruction, sleep can be improved。Unsuitable prolonged application, is limited for 3～5 days。(3) antihistaminic: first generation antihistamine drug such as chlorphenamine maleate chlorphenamine is effective to minimizing sneeze and rhinorrhea, and old people has prostate hyperplasia, and person is cautious use of。The antihistaminic of non-sedating effect lacks anticholinergic effect, and effect is not affirmed。(4) antipyretic-antalgic agent: may select in heating and muscular soreness, headache。The most frequently used with acetaminophen acetaminophen。Fixed simultaneously use many with the neat husband of inverase should be avoided。Aspirin is applied repeatedly can increase virus output, and it is slight to improve symptom effect, not recommends。(5) anti-tussive agents: generally do not advocate application for protection coughre flex, but play is coughed and can be applied as one sees fit when affecting rest, more with dextromethorphan application。2. antiviral treatment: influenza and parainfluenza virus, respiratory syncytial virus are had certain inhibitory action by ribavirin virazole, when clinical practice is only limitted to child's lower respiratory infection respiratory syncytial virus。Rhinovirus and other Respiroviruses be there is no effective antiviral drugs at present。3. antibiotic application。General not should, also without application antibiotic。The research of one placebo is shown in nose larynx flushing thing and cultivates the improvement having the subgroup of streptococcus pneumoniae, hemophilus influenza or moraxelle catarrhalis growth to account for 20% antibiotic therapy display symptom score。Therefore having bacteria planting, the underlying diseases such as in respiratory secretions, granulocyte increases, and the complication such as sinusitis, otitis media occurs, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease COPD and the patient that the flu course of disease surpasses 1 week can suitably apply antibiotic。4. treatment by Chinese herbs。Treatment by Chinese herbs common cold is effective。With clear temperature electuary。Often bag 15 grams。Every time take after mixing it with water every day 4 key agents of half bag have Folium Isatidis, Folium Mori, Rhizoma Phragmitis and Gypsum Fibrosum etc.。

Publication number 1907306A(application number 200610111666.X) Chinese patent literature disclose a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof。The preparation method of this injection is extracted by Ramulus Et Folium Picrasmae medical material alcohol heating reflux, and united extraction liquid reclaims ethanol, is condensed into thick paste, adds ethanol and make dissolving, filter, merging filtrate, extracts feature alkali, and be condensed into thick paste, obtain preparation intermediate；Using this intermediate, routinely preparation process, customary adjuvant, makes required injection in addition。The Chinese patent literature of publication No. CN102319295A (application number 201110284877.4) discloses a kind of medicament treating upper respiratory tract infection, and it is made up by weight of following bulk drugs: Herba Inulae cappae, Herba Pteridis Multifidae, Fructus Forsythiae, Radix et Rhizoma Dysosmatis, Radix Glycyrrhizae, Radix Sophorae Tonkinensis and Radix Isatidis。Application publication number CN103721090A(application number 201210387474.7) Chinese patent literature disclose a kind of Chinese medicine composition for treating upper respiratory tract infection, it is made up of the raw material of following parts by weight: Radix Bupleuri 30-35, Radix Puerariae 10-12, Gypsum Fibrosum 5-10, Radix Isatidis 20-25, Radix Scrophulariae 10-15, Rhizoma Osmundae 20-30, Stigma Maydis 20-35, Rhizoma Imperatae 30-45。

At present, doctor trained in Western medicine mainly adopts symptomatic treatment, there is no specific drug so far, and on the high side, and curative effect is not entirely satisfactory。Life-time service antibiotic can reduce Abwehrkraft des Koepers, causes bacterial resistance, makes the normal flora of human body lack of proper care, can cause secondary infection on the contrary。Traditional herbal mixture compatibility is suitable, can reach the effect for the treatment of both the principal and secondary aspects of a disease。But people often only focus on the research of curative effect, again in addition with empirical for many, and the research demonstrate,proving effect and dose-effect relationship aspect is less, therefore repeatable poor, and clinical expansion is restricted。

Summary of the invention

For the deficiencies in the prior art, it is an object of the invention to provide a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof。This injection is evident in efficacy, instant effect, will not produce drug resistance, according to clinical verification, has repeatability。

The technical scheme is that

The injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection, takes off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and is prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.4-1.2, Radix Isatidis 0.8-1.6, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.3-0.6, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.6-1.0, Herba Ecliptae 0.6-1.5。

The injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection, it is preferred that scheme is, takes off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and is prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.6-1.0, Radix Isatidis 1.0-1.3, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.35-0.52, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.7-0.9, Herba Ecliptae 0.8-1.2。

Treatment upper respiratory tract infection injection, it is more preferable to scheme be take off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and be prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.8, Radix Isatidis 1.1, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.42, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.8, Herba Ecliptae 1.1。

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 7.5-11 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 35-70 minute, and second time decocts 25-60 minute, and third time decocts 20-50 minute, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath；

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 8-16 hour, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste；

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 65-85 DEG C heated and stirred 25-55 minute, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.5-8.0；

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 6%-15% glucose solution, make, containing crude drug in whole 15%-25%, first to use filter paper filtering secondary, filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels again, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product。

Preferably being in that in step (1), amount of water is 8-10 times of medical material gross weight。

Preferably being in that in step (1), first time decocts 40-60 minute。

Preferably being in that in step (1), second time decocts 30-50 minute。

Preferably being in that in step (1), third time decocts 25-40 minute。

Preferably it is in that in step (2), places 10-14 hour。

Preferably being in that in step (3), 0.5% medicinal charcoal is in 70-80 DEG C of heating。

Preferably it is in that in step (3), heated and stirred 30-50 minute。

Preferably it is in that in step (3), the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.8-7.5。

Preferably it is in that in step (4), adds 8%-12% glucose solution。

Preferably it is in that in step (4), makes containing crude drug in whole 18%-22%。

More preferably, in step (1), amount of water is 8.8 times of medical material gross weight。

More preferably, in step (1), first time decocts 50 minutes。

More preferably, in step (1), second time decocts 40 minutes。

More preferably, in step (1), third time decocts 30 minutes。

More preferably, step (2) is placed 12 hours。

More preferably, step (3) adds 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 75 DEG C of heating。

More preferably, heated and stirred 40 minutes in step (3)。

More preferably, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 7.2 by step (3)。

More preferably, step (4) adds 10% glucose solution。

More preferably, step (4) makes containing crude drug in whole 20%。

The pharmacology of the present invention main raw material of Chinese medicine used is as follows:

Fructus Forsythiae: base: for the dry fruit of Oleaceae plants Fructus Forsythiae。The property of medicine: bitter, is slightly cold。Return lung, the heart, small intestine meridian。Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, dispersing swelling and dissipating binds。For carbuncle, scrofula, acute mastitis, erysipelas, anemopyretic cold, epidemic febrile disease from the beginning of, warm is joined the army, high hot excessive thirst, and coma sends out speckle, pyretic stranguria urine retention。

Radix Isatidis: base: for the dry root of cruciferae isatis。The property of medicine: bitter, cold。GUIXIN, stomach warp。Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, removing heat from blood sore-throat relieving。For maculae caused by violent heat pathogen, crimson tongue is purple dark, mumps, sore throat, scarlet fever, major part pestilence, erysipelas, carbuncle。

Gypsum Fibrosum: be mainly composed of hydrous calcium sulfate。Additionally, still have the ferrum of a small amount of silicic acid, aluminium hydroxide, sulfide and trace, magnesium etc.。The property of medicine: pungent, sweet, Great Cold。Attach to the lung and stomach meridians。Function cures mainly: clearing away heat-fire, and relieving restlessness is quenched the thirst, and restrains granulation promoting。Curing mainly: apoplexy cold and heat, heart subinverse gas is frightened to be breathed heavily, xerostomia scorching tongue, it is impossible to breath, hardness and fullness in the abdomen pain, evil removing ghost, puerperium incised wound。Except seasonal epidemic pathogens headache fever of the body, three burnt big heat, skin heat, stagnation of QI in the intestines and stomach, expelling pathogenic factors from muscles by diaphoresis, restlessness accompanied by ascending of QI of only quenching one's thirst, the sudden and violent gas of abdominal distention, pant and swallow heat, also can do bath soup。

Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth.: base: hammer the tuber of melon for cucurbitaceous plant rod into shape。The property of medicine: bitter, puckery, cold。Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, pain relieving。Main bacillary dysentery, enteritis, gastritis, pharyngolaryngitis, parotitis, periodontitis, epidemic hemorrhagic conjunctivitis, tonsillitis, high heat, urinary tract infection。

Herba Ecliptae: base: for the herb of dicotyledon medicine feverfew Eclipta prostrata。The property of medicine: sweet, sour, cool。Return kidney, Liver Channel。Function cures mainly: nourishing the liver and kidney, crow palpus teeth consolidating, cooling blood for hemostasis。Main deficiency of the liver and kindey, vertigo and tinnitus, blurring of vision, soreness of the waist and knees, turn white luxated tooth, stranguria caused by overstrain foul leukorrhea, spitting of blood, spits blood, epistaxis, hematuria, dysentery, metrorrhagia, traumatic hemorrhage。

The injection compatibility for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection provided by the invention is scientific and reasonable。In addition, the excellent results of the present invention is also manifested by:

1, instant effect, evident in efficacy；

2, drug resistance will not be produced；

3, price is low, alleviates patient burden；

4, have no side effect, according to clinical verification, there is repeatability。

Detailed description of the invention

Describe technical scheme in detail below in conjunction with embodiment and experimental example, but protection domain is not limited to this。

Embodiment 1 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 30g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.4 part, Radix Isatidis 0.8 part, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.3 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.6 part, Herba Ecliptae 0.6 part。

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 7.5 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 35 minutes, and second time decocts 25 minutes, and third time decocts 20 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath；

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 8 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste；

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 65 DEG C of heated and stirred 25 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.5；

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 6% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 15%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product。

Consumption: maximum per kilogram of body weight is less than 25 grams (crude drugs), and minimum per kilogram of body weight is not less than 2 grams (crude drugs)。Grasping according to the state of an illness, administering mode can use intravenous injection and intramuscular injection。

Embodiment 2 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 20g): Fructus Forsythiae 1.2 parts, Radix Isatidis 1.6 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.6 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 1.0 parts, Herba Ecliptae 1.5 parts。

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 11 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 70 minutes, and second time decocts 60 minutes, and third time decocts 50 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath；

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 16 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste；

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 85 DEG C of heated and stirred 55 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 8.0；

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 15% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 25%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product。

Model case one: yellow XX, man, 29 years old。Medical history: main cause cough increases the weight of to examine over one day for 3 days。Having a medical check-up: body temperature is normal, swallow red tonsil little, heart rate 75 beats/min, double; two pulmonary respiration sounds are not slightly heard and dry moist rale。Diagnosis: upper respiratory tract infection。Infuse 2 days without being clearly better。Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 15 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time。Using 1 time, cough symptom substantially alleviates。Using twice, all diseases disappear, without other untoward reaction in transfusion, and recovery from illness。

Embodiment 3 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 40g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.6 part, Radix Isatidis 1.0 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.35 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.7 part, Herba Ecliptae 0.8 part。

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 10 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste；

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 70 DEG C of heated and stirred 30 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.8；

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 8% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 18%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product。

Model case two: grandson XX, female, 32 years old。Medical history: before one week, pharyngalgia occurred, generate heat subsequently, the highest 38.5 DEG C, bring down a fever after certainly taking the medicines such as GANMAO CHONGJI。Cough subsequently, few expectorant, pharyngeal discomfort。Take cefradine 5。Cough exacerbation of symptoms, impact sleep。Also cough incessantly daytime from today。After being ill, Stomach in Patients receive can, without Nausea and vomiting, without losing weight。Physical examination: T:37.5 DEG C, P:80 beat/min, R:20 beat/min, BP:125/75mmHg。Breathing smooth-going, superficial lymph knot does not touch enlargement, pharyngeal hyperemia, II ° of enlargement of tonsil。Two lungs kowtow that rhonchus is clear, respiratory murmur is slightly thick, do not hear and dry moist rale。Heart rate 80 beats/min, the rhythm of the heart is neat。Auxiliary examination: WBC:6.2；L:17%；N:78%；RBC:3.86；HB:129；PLT:204；Blood biochemistry and other no abnormality seen。Diagnosis is upper respiratory tract infection。Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 10 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time。Using 1 time, cough symptom is substantially alleviated。Using 2 times, all diseases disappear, without other untoward reaction in transfusion, and recovery from illness。

Model case three: king XX, female, 42 years old。Main suit: heating companioned with headache, watery nasal discharge 5 days。History of present illness: fever occur without obvious inducement before patient's private prosecution 5 days, watery nasal discharge, with headache, town hospital transfusion 3 days without positive effect。Before telling one day, pharyngalgia occurs, increase the weight of gradually, cough but no phlegm。Physical examination: health check-up: T:37.6 DEG C, P:86, R20/min, BP:120/80mmHg。Pharynx rear wall is substantially congested, it is seen that lymph steeps, II ° of enlargement of bilateral amygdala hyperemia。Double; two pulmonary respiration sounds are clear, do not hear and dry and wet rale。Diagnosis is acute upper respiratory tract infection。Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 15 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time。Using 1 time, all diseases disappear, and without other untoward reaction in transfusion, are totally lost, and recovery from illness is left。

Embodiment 5 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 50g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.8 part, Radix Isatidis 1.1 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.42 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.8 part, Herba Ecliptae 1.1 parts。

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 8.8 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 50 minutes, and second time decocts 40 minutes, and third time decocts 30 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath；

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 12 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste；

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 75 DEG C of heated and stirred 40 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 7.2；

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 10% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 20%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product。

The clinical practice of the injection of test example 1 embodiment 5 gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection: in May ,-2013 in November, 2011,272 example upper respiratory tract infection patients are screened in 6 hospitals, women 150 example, wherein male 122 example, oldest 65 years old, minimum 3 years old of age, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days。It is randomly divided into two groups, experimental group and matched group。Experimental group women 77 example, male 59 example, age 3-65 year, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days。Matched group women 73 example, male 63 example, age 3-65 year, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days。Between two groups of patients, the aspect such as sex, age, course of disease compares, and no significant difference (P > 0.05) has comparability。Experimental group uses embodiment 5 products obtained therefrom, consumption: maximum per kilogram of body weight is less than 25 grams (crude drugs), and minimum per kilogram of body weight is not less than 2 grams (crude drugs)。Grasping according to the state of an illness, administering mode can use intravenous injection and intramuscular injection。Matched group uses the medicine (such as ribavirin granule, SHUANGHUANGLIAN KOUFUYE, amoxicillin etc.) of conventional therapy treatment upper respiratory tract infection。Curative effect judging standard: cure: body temperature is normal, total white blood cells disappears at normal range, Clinical symptom and sign；Effective: body temperature is normal, total white blood cells is substantially alleviated close to normal range, Clinical symptom and sign；Take a turn for the better: body temperature takes a turn for the better close to normal, total white blood cells close to normal range, Clinical symptom and sign；Invalid: body temperature does not drop or raises, total white blood cells is higher than 10 × 109/ L, Clinical symptom and sign are without taking a turn for the better or increasing the weight of。Total effective rate is that healing adds effective number of cases and accounts for the percentage ratio of all number of cases of this group。After treating 2 days, result is as shown in table 1。

Table 1: use embodiment 5 product upper respiratory tract infection patient treatment outcome

As it can be seen from table 1 experimental group cures 102 examples, effective 34 examples, total effective rate 100%；Matched group cures 68 examples, effective 30 examples, and take a turn for the better 24 examples, invalid 14 examples, total effective rate 72.06%。Test shows, experimental group and matched group difference have significance, and the effect of experimental group is substantially better than matched group。

The present invention selects Fructus Forsythiae, Radix Isatidis, Gypsum Fibrosum, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. and Herba Ecliptae to carry out compatibility, makes the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection。Fructus Forsythiae heat-clearing and toxic substances removing in side, dispersing swelling and dissipating binds。Radix Isatidis heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, removing heat from blood sore-throat relieving。Gypsum Fibrosum clearing away heat-fire, relieving restlessness is quenched the thirst, and restrains granulation promoting。Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) section.content: 本发明公开了一种有机‑硅氧烷共聚物组合物，所述有机‑硅氧烷共聚物组合物可用于制备皮肤接触粘合剂或涂层。皮肤接触粘合剂组合物包含(I)有机‑硅氧烷共聚物组合物和(II)赋形剂。通过硬化所述组合物制备的皮肤接触粘合剂可用于应用诸如用于医用胶带的粘合剂、用于伤口敷料的粘合剂、用于假体的粘合剂、造瘘术器具粘合剂、用于医用监测器具的粘合剂、用于疤痕疗法治疗的粘合剂、用于化妆品药贴的粘合剂以及透皮药物递送系统。涂料组合物包含(a)有机‑硅氧烷共聚物组合物和(b)涂料添加剂。通过硬化所述涂料组合物制备的所述涂层可用于处理皮革。

An organo-siloxane copolymer composition is disclosed that can be used to prepare skin contact adhesives or coatings. The skin contact adhesive composition comprises (I) an organo-siloxane copolymer composition and (II) an excipient. Skin-contact adhesives prepared by hardening the composition are useful for applications such as adhesives for medical tapes, adhesives for wound dressings, adhesives for prostheses, ostomy appliance adhesives, adhesives for medical monitoring appliances, adhesives for scar therapy treatment, adhesives for cosmetic patches, and transdermal drug delivery systems. The coating composition comprises (a) an organo-siloxane copolymer composition and (b) a coating additive. The coating prepared by hardening the coating composition can be used for treating leather.

The copolymer compositions applied for coating and adhesiveThe cross reference of related application

The U.S. Provisional Patent Application Serial No. 62/396336 that patent application claims September in 2016 is submitted on the 19th it is excellent First weigh.The U.S. Provisional Patent Application of Serial No. 62/396336 is incorporated by reference accordingly.

Background technique

Technical field

Copolymer compositions can be used for preparing skin contact adhesive and/or coating in substrate.It discloses preparation and makes With the method for copolymer compositions.Copolymer compositions include organosiloxane copolymer.

Brief introduction

Various types of skin contact adhesives have been proposed for skin contact application such as medical adhesive tape Adhesive, the adhesive for prosthese, ostomy appliance adhesive, is used for medical monitor at the adhesive for wound dressing The adhesive of tool, for scar therapy treatment adhesive and transdermal drug delivery systems.Aqueous colloidal adhesive and propylene Acid esters adhesive usually has highest adhesion strength (for example, it is desired to ceiling capacity to remove from skin).Polyurethane binder With the second high adhesion strength, and siloxanes has the minimum adhesion strength of the skin contact adhesive of these types.With need It those of to remove adhesive compared with low energy to compare, there are skin contact adhesives of higher adhesion strength (to need higher for those Energy removes) during removal in may cause bigger pain and wound may be caused to skin.Certain skins connect Touching adhesive is also possible to leave unexpected residue on the skin during removal.

During chronic wound care, adhesiveness wound dressing and/or medical adhesive tape may during more change dressings In wound and cause pain and damage at wound circumference.Repeatedly apply and remove skin contact adhesive may bring pain and Wound, for the patient with delicate skin.Delicate skin is usually characterized by that skin is thin and is easy to tear, And it is more common in the elderly compared to other crowds.Aging, light exposure and heredity are the factor for causing thinning of skin. Some drugs (oral or topical corticosteroid is such as used for a long time) are it is also possible that the blood vessel in skin and skin becomes crisp It is weak, and make it easier to by wound associated with adhesive is removed.Individual with delicate skin can also occur in The situation that cohesive force between epidermis and corium and between corium and subcutaneous tissue is lost, this is easier these individuals There is a situation where skin lacerations and wound, especially when using the skin contact adhesive with higher adhesion strength.

In addition, silicone adhesive (for example, by two parts those of silicone elastomer preparation of catalysis) may be uncomfortable Such as transdermal drug delivery is applied for certain skin contact adhesives.It is used to prepare certain catalyst of silicone elastomer (such as, for the platinum metal catalysts of Si―H addition reaction) may negatively affect the medicinal actives in transdermal drug delivery device Ingredient.

In addition to skin contact adhesive, polyurethane and polysiloxane are also used for the painting being applied in various substrates Material.Known polyurethane has high mechanical tenacity, but has some defects, and such as temperature tolerance, moisture-proof and irradiation stability are limited. Polysiloxane is highly stable at ambient conditions.Some polysiloxane are incorporated into the coating based on polyurethane There are challenges in industry, because the chemical property of polysiloxane and polyurethane makes it have the compatibility being very limited.

Problem to be solved

Industry, which needs to develop, can be used for being formed the skin contact adhesive with one or more of following benefit Composition: good bond properties, the ability (for example, transdermal drug delivery application in) of transfer activity ingredient, moisture-proof (from Environment is to skin), conveying of the water from skin to environment, stability, minimum skin irritatin, during using and removing to skin Damage it is minimum and/or residue during removal and after removing on skin is minimum.Industry also needs to develop one kind The composition that can be used for being formed on the substrate coating, with one or more of following benefit: in polyurethane and silicon oxygen Improved compatibility, improved weatherability, hydrophobicity, hydrolytic stability, radiation resistance, heat resistance, corrosion resistance between alkane, Surface smoothness and gloss, scratch resistance, under similar solid content relatively low viscosity (influence volatile organic content, VOC) and friction reduces.

inventionTitles.title: 固溶体组合物及其在剧痛中的用途
Solid solution compositions and their use in severe pain

addressbook.lastName: 因佛斯特医疗有限公司
威尔逊·卡帕罗斯-万德莱

address.address1: Beijing Shun Fonda Intellectual Property Agency Co., Ltd.
Beijing Shun Fonda Intellectual Property Agency Co., Ltd.

section.content: 本说明书公开了药物组合物、制备此类药物组合物的方法以及使用此类药物组合物治疗个体的剧痛的方法和用途。

The present specification discloses pharmaceutical compositions, methods of making such pharmaceutical compositions, and methods and uses of treating severe pain in an individual using such pharmaceutical compositions.

Solid solution composition and its purposes in severe painThe continuation application of this paper parts is asked non-provisional specially in the U.S. submitted for 3rd for 2 months in 2012 according to 35U.S.C. § 120 The priority of profit application 13/365,824, the U.S. Non-provisional Patent application 13/365,824 are request on October 31st, 2011 The part continuation application of the priority of patent application PCT/GB2011/052115 of submission, the patent application PCT/GB2011/ 052115 is to ask 1018289.7 priority of GB submitted on October 29th, 2010 and ask to submit on 2 3rd, 2012 special The international patent application of the priority of profit application US 13/365,828, and August 10 in 2011 is asked in the continuation application of this paper parts 1113729.6,2011 years Augusts of GB GB submitted on the 10th that 1113730.4,2011 years Augusts of GB that day submits are submitted on the 10th The priority of 1113728.8 and 2011 years 2 months GB 1101937.9 submitted for 4th, and this paper parts continuation application foundation 35U.S.C. § 119 (e) ask the U.S. Provisional Patent Application 61/752,309 submitted on January 14th, 2013 and in 2013 years 1 The priority for the U.S. Provisional Patent Application 61/752,356 that the moon is submitted on the 14th, it is described to apply for the side by integrally quoting herein Formula is incorporated to.

Technical field

Purposes the present invention relates to solid solution composition and its in severe pain.

Background technology

Pain is a kind of subjective and extremely complex perception, it, which signals individual tissue damage, has occurred or can Can occur.Pain is probably of short duration, lasts only for about and causes the destructive stimulus of pain to be removed or primary injury or disease Shape has been fully recovered, or may be continueed to and be damaged after recovery from illness and continue to several months or longer a period of time.Pain reaction With both physiological compositions and psychological component.Pain reaction causes broad range of perception, these perception can be described as：Late Blunt, sense of aching, sharp tingling sensation, heat, cold or ice are burnt sense, numb or gargalesthesia or numbness.It may feel in a region of body Feel pain, for example, your back, belly or chest or throughout whole body (such as when all muscle in body ache because of influenza During pain).

In the U.S., severe pain is the most common reason of individual consulting medical staff.This is one in many medical conditions A cardinal symptom, and the quality of life and conventional func of patient may be seriously affected.In itself, severe pain is a kind of tight Heavy and expensive health disease.

Conventional therapies for treating severe pain are limited, are usually directed to taking for multi-medicament, and be understood that It is to be unable to complete incidence graph pain and may not recover quality of life.These therapies may need frequent drug administration, may with not Desired systemic side effects are associated, and the commonly provided unsatisfactory alleviation.A kind of therefore, there is still a need for special pin The therapeutic choice developed to severe pain, the therapeutic choice lasting remission is provided while minimize systemic side effects and medicine with The possibility of drug interaction.

The content of the invention

Subject description discloses solid solution pharmaceutical composition and for treating the individual method by severe pain illness.This Pharmaceutical composition disclosed in text can be prepared in the way of substantially lipid adjuvant transmission system is produced, the lipid auxiliary Agent Transmission system can make to have the therapeutic compound of anti-pain activity to be transmitted in a manner of more effectively inhibition of pain reacts. Final result is the treatment improved to severe pain illness.

The aspect of this specification is partly disclosed including therapeutic compound and one or more of room temperature solid lipids Solid solution pharmaceutical composition.Solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can further comprise one or more of room temperature liquid Body fat matter, one or more of stabilizers, one or more of neutralizers or its arbitrary combination.Therapeutic compound can have Anti-inflammatory activity.

Other aspects of this specification, which partly disclose, a kind of prepares solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein Method.Method disclosed herein comprises the following steps：A) therapeutic compound disclosed herein and one or more are made Room temperature liquid lipid contacts under conditions of allowing the therapeutic compound to be dissolved in lipid；And b) make compound/lipid Solution is contacted with one or more of room temperature solid lipids under conditions of allowing solid solution composition to be formed.In the side of the method In face, therapeutic compound is dissolved into one or more of room temperature liquid lipids to form solution using heating.In the method Other aspect in, step (a) includes：Under conditions of allowing the therapeutic compound to be dissolved in lipid, make institute's public affairs herein The therapeutic compound opened and one or more of room temperature liquid lipids and/or one or more of stabilizers and/or one kind or More kinds of neutralizer contacts.

Other aspects of this specification disclose a kind of individual method treated and suffer from severe pain illness, the described method includes The step of its required pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein being applied to individual, wherein associated with severe pain illness using causing Symptom mitigate, so as to treat individual.

Other aspects of this specification disclose a kind of solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein for treating Purposes in the manufacture of the medicine of severe pain.

Other aspects of this specification disclose a kind of solid solution medicine group for being used to treat severe pain disclosed herein Compound.

Other aspects of this specification disclose a kind of solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein and are used to treat play The purposes of pain.

Brief description of the drawings

Fig. 1 shows the differential scanning calorimetry (DSC) (DSC) of the solid solution composition disclosed herein including brufen Curve map.Figure 1A is the DSC curve figure of brufen, only the melting range of 75 DEG C to 78 DEG C of display；Figure 1B isDSC curve figure, only 41 DEG C to 45 DEG C of melting range of display；Fig. 1 C are to includeWith the DSC curve figure of the carrier of PEG 400,32 DEG C to 38 DEG C are shown With 41 DEG C to 45 DEG C of melting range；Fig. 1 D are the DSC curve figures of brufen composition LA 35-1,32 DEG C to 44 DEG C of display Melting range；Fig. 1 E are the DSC curve figures of brufen composition LA 35-2, the melting range of 32 DEG C to 43 DEG C of display；Fig. 1 F are The DSC curve figure of brufen composition LA 35-1, the melting range of 32 DEG C to 42 DEG C of display；Fig. 1 G are brufen composition LA The DSC curve figure of 35-1, the melting range of 32 DEG C to 38 DEG C of display；Fig. 1 H are the DSC curves of brufen composition LA 35-1 Figure, the melting range of 32 DEG C to 42 DEG C of display；

Fig. 2 shows the DSC curve figure of Artemether compound LA 2-15-1, the melting range of 35 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display.

Fig. 3 shows the DSC curve figure of aspirin composition LA 3-86-3, the melting range of 35 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display.

Fig. 4 shows the DSC curve figure of dantrolene composition LA 3-104-2, the fusing point model of 34 DEG C to 39 DEG C of display Enclose.

Fig. 5 shows the DSC curve figure of diclofenac composition LA 3-103, the melting range of 35 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display.

Fig. 6 shows the DSC curve figure of Fenofibrate composition LA 2-19, the melting range of 34 DEG C to 39 DEG C of display.

Fig. 7 shows the DSC curve figure of lidocaine composition LA 3-101-2, the fusing point model of 34 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display Enclose.

Fig. 8 shows the DSC curve figure of Nabumetone composition LA 3-105-1, the fusing point model of 35 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display Enclose.

Fig. 9 shows the DSC curve figure of naproxen composition LA 1-23-5, the melting range of 30 DEG C to 39 DEG C of display.

Figure 10 shows the DSC curve figure of salbutamol composition LA 1, the melting range of 32 DEG C to 40 DEG C of display.

Figure 11 shows the DSC curve figure of salmeterol composition LA 1-23-7, the fusing point model of 34 DEG C to 43 DEG C of display Enclose.

Figure 12 shows the DSC curve figure of simvastatin composite LA 3-83-3, the fusing point model of 32 DEG C to 43 DEG C of display Enclose.

Figure 13 shows the DSC curve figure of telmisartan composition LA 1, the melting range of 34 DEG C to 43 DEG C of display.

Embodiment

Subject description discloses the solid solution composition for preparing a variety of therapeutic compounds.Solid solution composition is knot Brilliant solid, the crystalline solid include solvent materials matrix (it can be solid at normal temperatures) and solute, and wherein molecule is solid Be in solution arrange in a random basis and be not in ordered arrangement.Solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein serves as transmission system System, the transmission system enable therapeutic compound disclosed herein by more effectively inhibition of pain react in a manner of more Effectively transmit or be directed to cell, tissue, organ or body part.The suppression causes the treatment for improving severe pain.

For example, pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can promote therapeutic compound disclosed herein to be delivered to macrophage Cell.Macrophage is present at the intersection of two elementary paths, is that immune system is also chief cell in lipid metabolism. On immune system, most of pathogen have the surface component containing lipid, and macrophage can recognize that the component and then gulp down Bite pathogen.A kind of possible mechanism for obtaining the distribution of this selectivity organism is that pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can be by It is designed to the activity using chylomicron.Chylomicron is relatively large body fat protein body, has 75nm to 1,200nm's Diameter.Including triglycerides (85-92%), Phospholipids (6-12%), cholesterol (1-3%) and apolipoprotein (1-2%), chyle Dietary lipids are transported to the other positions of body by particulate from intestines.Chylomicron is one of five kinds of key components of lipoprotein, its His is VLDL, IDL, low-density lipoprotein (LDL), high-density lipoprotein (LDL), it enables metabolism of lipid and cholesterol in blood Moved in the group water solution of stream.

In digestion process, aliphatic acid and cholesterol pass through the pancreatic juice containing lipase and the work of cholate emulsification in intestines and stomach With lower protomere is produced by processing.These protomeres cause lipid as free fatty by being known as enterocyte Intestinal epithelial cells absorb.Once into enterocyte, triglycerides and cholesterol are combined into nascent chylomicron.Just Raw chylomicron is mainly made of triglycerides (85%) and contains some cholesterol and cholesteryl ester.Main load fat egg Bai Zufen is Apolipoprotein B-48 (APOB48).These nascent chylomicrons are discharged into breast by exocytosis from intestinal cell Mi Guan, originating from the lymphatic vessel in intestinal villi, be then secreted into ductus thoracicus and left subclavian vein connectivity part in blood flow.

When in lymph and blood circulation, chylomicron exchanges component with HDL.The HDL is carried to nascent chylomicron For apoC-II (APOC2) and apo E (APOE), and therefore it is converted to chylomicron (the usually letter of maturation Referred to as " chylomicron | ").APOC2 is the co-factor of lipoprotein lipase (LPL) activity.Once triglyceride storage is distributed, breast APOC2 back to HDL (but retain APOE), thus is become chylomicron remnant by rotten particulate, now only 30-50nm. APOB48 and APOE is used for encytosis in liver for identification and is decomposed into the chylomicron of lipoprotein (VLDL, LDL and HDL) Remnants are important.These lipoprotein (are included through competent cell：For example, liver cell, adipocyte and macrophage) processing And storage.Therefore, in the case not wish to be bound by any theory, by being administered orally, drug regimen disclosed herein Thing can be processed into micella, while be absorbed in the gastrointestinal tract by enterocyte, and be combined into nascent chylomicron, keep It is associated with the chylomicron remnant absorbed by liver, and be finally fitted into the macrophage for being present in inflammatory tissue.

As another example, pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can promote therapeutic compound disclosed herein to pass It is delivered to Dendritic Cells.Realizing a kind of mechanism of the selectivity organism distribution of pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can be Utilize endocytosis/phagocytic activity of Dendritic Cells.Dendritic Cells is to form the immunocyte of part immune system. The major function of Dendritic Cells is processing antigen-like material and is on the surface of other cells of immune system by it.Thus, tree Prominent shape cell functions as the antigen presenting cell that courier is served as between congenital immunity and adaptive immunity.Dendron shape is thin Born of the same parents are present in the tissue contacted with external environment condition, (wherein have the specialization dendron shape of referred to as Langerhans cell thin for example, skin Born of the same parents' type) and nose, lung, the internal layer of stomach and intestines.These cells are found in blood with immature state.It once is activated, The cell migration is anti-to start and form adaptive immunity with T cell and B cell interaction to lymph node, here its Should.Known Dendritic Cells endocytosis and phagocytosis lipid granule are as its environmental monitoring and a part for Antigen presentation.Not Wish in the case of being bound by any theory, by part or inhalation, pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can permeate To the internal layer of skin or nose, lung, stomach and intestines, by Dendritic Cells endocytosis/phagocytosis, and finally load existing in Inflamed tissue T cell and/or B cell.

In addition to the orientation of therapeutic compound disclosed herein is transmitted, solid solution pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein Utilize the different melting temperatures of used various lipids.By controlling the type and quantity of the lipid added, institute is public herein The pharmaceutical composition opened can be formed in it is substantially solid at room temperature, but when reaching body temperature (such as after intake) melt. Gained melt composition is easily formed by the micella of intestinal absorption, is combined into chylomicron, and finally absorbed by macrophage or by Dendritic cells as described above absorb.

The aspect of this specification partly discloses a kind of solid solution composition.Solid solution composition disclosed herein is usual Applied as pharmaceutically acceptable composition.As used herein, term " pharmaceutically acceptable " refers to work as and is administered to Side effect, allergic reaction or other unfavorable or adverse reaction any molecular entities or composition are not produced when individual.As herein Used, term " pharmaceutically acceptable composition " is synonymous with " pharmaceutical composition ", and represents active ingredient (for example, originally Any therapeutic compound disclosed in text) treatment valid density.Pharmaceutical composition disclosed herein can be used for medicine and Veterinary applications.Pharmaceutical composition can individually be administered to individual, or with other complementarity active ingredients, medicament, medicine or Hormone combines and is administered to individual.

In order to influence the drug effect of therapeutic compound disclosed herein, the solid solution composition must have three spies Sign.First, at least one lipid for the solid solution composition must be by least one Fatty acid compositions, the aliphatic acid Carbon chain lengths higher than 12 and less than 24, be consequently adapted to absorb by enterocyte path.Less than the C12-C24Chain length Aliphatic acid does not form lipid-drug matrix, and therefore the medicine by normal absorption process by absorption of human body.Although form Lipid-drug matrix, but it is higher than the C12-C24The aliphatic acid of chain length, it is impossible to absorbed, and medicine is from solid solution composition Leach, and eliminated by intestines and stomach from body.

Second, therapeutic compound should have lipophile in itself, so that itself and C12-C24Lipid forms solid solution matrix. As discussed below, this lipophile can be therapeutic compound (fat-soluble medicine preparation) it is intrinsic, or can use in base Be conducive to fat-soluble medicine in extensive range in matter (free acid/free base agent preparation, salt pharmaceutical preparation and combined pharmaceutical formulation) Some additives of thing.

3rd, therapeutic compound should influence the biology of certain cell type in itself, certain described cell type leads to Lipid-adjuvant property contact of solid solution composition is crossed, and is finally circulated in vivo.It is micro- that such construct includes chyle Grain, LDL particulates and HDL particulates.The cell type contacted can include macrophage, dendritic cells and adipocyte and cancer is thin Born of the same parents.Tissue with high surfaces lipid content can also be preferably as target.These tissues include nerve fiber and brain.

Subject description discloses the solid solution composition of four kinds of general types, i.e. fat-soluble medicine preparation, free acid/free Alkali pharmaceutical preparation, salt pharmaceutical preparation and combined pharmaceutical formulation.The solid solution composition prepared using fat-soluble medicine preparation is only needed Lipid composition is wanted so that therapeutic compound disclosed herein is configured to solid solution composition.It is being not intended to be limited by theory In the case of, usually fat-soluble medicine can be dissolved in lipid under heating.After the cooling period, it is believed that lipid composition and medicine Thing forms the lipid-drug matrix being organized into the way of wherein lipid encases medicine.Due to only existing hydrophobic interaction, Therefore there is no the organized alignment for producing solid solution composition (that is, will not crystallize into typical for these lipid-drug matrix Solid form).

In general, the therapeutic compound with the about 3.0 or logP of higher is suitable for fat-soluble medicine preparation.It is non-limiting Example include artemisine arteether, Artemether, qinghaosu, artesunate and dihydroartemisinine；Fibrates medicine, as benzene pricks shellfish Spy, ciprofibrate, clofibrate, fenofibrate and Gemfibrozil；And Statins Atorvastatin, Fluvastatin, Lovastatin, Cut down statin, Pravastatin, rosuvastatin and Simvastatin.

Fat-soluble medicine preparation without using or be not required surfactant.In addition, fat-soluble medicine preparation without using or not Need to be not based on the solvent of lipid.

The solid solution composition prepared using free acid/free base agent preparation also needs to stabilizer in addition to lipid composition Therapeutic compound disclosed herein is configured to solid solution composition.Therapeutic chemical combination with free acid or free alkali Thing is dissolvable in water in lipid under heating, but after cooling to room temperature by crystallization to form typical solid composite.This occurs The reason for kind phenomenon is due to that the macroscopic property of these mixtures is conducive to the solid phase compared with low energy.In order to produce solid solution group Compound, it is necessary to add stabilizer to stablize medicine and prevent it to be transformed into typical solid phase after the cooling period.It is being not intended to by theory In the case of limitation, it is believed that stabilizer is coated after lipid-drug matrix is formed.This coating is hindered between matrix Interaction, so as to prevent alignment necessary to forming the crystalline matrix of solid compositions.In this way, it will not occur to turn to solid phase Become, and form solid solution composition.Therefore, stabilizer be for the thermodynamic transition of typical solid phase provide barrier or by this Kind transformation extends to the compound of its impossible degree.The example of stabilizer includes liquid macrogol, isobide two Methyl ether, diethylene glycol monoethyl ether (2- (2- ethoxyethoxies) ethanol), a hydration alcohol.

In general, the therapeutic compound of the logP with about 2.2 to about 3.0 can be used for free acid/free base agent preparation. Non-limiting examples include the ester of non-steroid anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) and aminobenzoic acid.NSAID includes salicyclic acid derivatives NSAID, P-aminophenol derivatives NSAID, propanoic derivatives NSAID, acetogenin NSAID, bmap acid (former times health) are derivative Thing NSAID, fenamic acid derivative NSAID, non-selective cyclo-oxygenase (COX) inhibitor, selective cyclooxygenase 1 (COX 1) Inhibitor, selective cyclooxygenase 2 (COX 2) inhibitor.The ester of aminobenzoic acid includes amylocaine, anaesthesine, cloth Big cacaine, butamben, chloroprocanine, dimethocaine, lidocaine, meprylcaine, metabutethamine, metabutoxycaine, Russia are appropriate Cacaine, prilocaine, propoxycaine, procaine (procaine hydrochloride), proparacaine, risocaine and totokaine.

Using the solid solution composition of salt formulating medicinal preparations also needed in addition to lipid composition neutralizer with by herein public affairs The therapeutic compound opened is configured to solid solution composition.Therapeutic compound salt dissolves in lipid under heating, but is cooling down Crystallization is formed into typical solid composite after to room temperature.The reason for this phenomenon occurs is due to the thermodynamics of these mixtures Property is conducive to the solid phase compared with low energy.In order to produce solid solution composition, it is necessary to add neutralizer to neutralize therapeutic chemical combination Thing salt, and prevent it to be transformed into typical solid phase after the cooling period.In the case where being not intended to bound by theory, it is believed that neutralize Agent eliminates the presence of the electric charge in salt medicine.It is this to neutralize the ionic interaction hindered between matrix, so as to prevent from being formed Alignment necessary to the crystalline matrix of solid compositions.In this way, the transformation to solid phase will not occur, and form solid solution combination Thing.Therefore, neutralizer is to provide barrier to the thermodynamic transition of typical solid phase or this transformation being extended to it and will not occur Degree compound.

Neutralizer includes the triethanolamine for the aliphatic acid of basic salt medicine and for acid salt medicine.Degree of neutralization takes Certainly in the amount for the neutralizer for being added to preparation.Neutralized for complete, add the neutralizer of a molar equivalent into preparation.For Part neutralizes, and addition is less than a molar equivalent.It is favourable in part and in terms of sustained release preparation is produced.Upon administration, one Drug dispensing thing is immediately applicable in body (instant bioavailability), and the biological utilisation of another part is delayed by immediately, until passing through Neutralizer neutralizes.Neutralizer can also be excessively added, i.e. a unnecessary molar equivalent.It is excessive to neutralize in addition to neutralizing salt medicine Agent also allows for the fusing point of adjustment solid solution composition.

event-title.$: DEEMED WITHDRAWAL OF PATENT APPLICATION AFTER PUBLICATION (PATENT LAW 2001)

section.content: The present invention provides hepatoprotectant acetaminophen mutual prodrugs having an acetaminophen moiety covalently linked to a second moiety which may act as a hepatoprotectant against acetaminophen hepatotoxicity. In addition, acetaminophen mutual prodrugs also have increased aqueous solubility and are therefore more suitable for parenteral and other dosage forms than acetaminophen. Also provided are methods of treating diseases or conditions responsive to acetaminophen (e.g., fever, pain, and ischemic injury) using the hepatoprotectant acetaminophen mutual prodrug, as well as kits and unit dosage forms.

The hepatoprotective acetaminophen is worked in coordination with prodrugThe cross reference of related application

It is the U.S. Provisional Application 61/054 of " the hepatoprotective acetaminophen is worked in coordination with prodrug " that the application requires in the denomination of invention that on May 20th, 2008 submitted; 777 priority; the content of this application is incorporated herein by reference in full, just as complete listing hereinafter.

Background of invention

Acetaminophen (be also referred to as acetaminophen, its chemical name is N-(4-hydroxy phenyl) acetamide)) is a kind of analgesics that is widely used in the various situations relevant of treatment with pain.For example, acetaminophen can be used for controlling pain that operation or traumatic damage cause, by the chronic inflammatory disease pain and the back pain that cause of osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis for example.In some cases, acetaminophen is used for the treatment of by blended pain/Shen through the characteristic of disease cause of disease pain that causes of cancer or fibromyalgia for example.Acetaminophen also can be used for controlling other disease, for example myocardial damage (Spiler NM, Rork TH, Merrill GF; Curr Drug Targets Cardiovasc Haematol Disord.2005; 5 (5): 419-29) and nerve injury (Bisaglia M, Venezia V, Piccioli P, Stanzione S, Porcile C, Russo C, Mancini F, Milanese C, Schettini G.Neurochem Int.2002; 41 (1): 43-54).

In worldwide, produce, a large amount of acetaminophen of writing out a prescription and providing and delivering (separately or with for example opioid associating of other therapeutic agent).Along with to conventional NSAID (for example ibuprofen and naproxen) and selective cyclooxygenase-2 inhibitor (for example ) cardiovascular and the increase of gastrointestinal safety concerns, as if patient and doctor begin to turn to the use acetaminophen, because the risk of its safety is lower.

But known acetaminophen under certain conditions may be to liver toxigenicity (being called hepatotoxicity).According to estimates, the most liver transplantation of the U.S. is caused in all acute hepatic failure cases in 2004, have 49% owing to the acetaminophen over administration causes by acetaminophen toxicity.Acetaminophen (with Sell with other trade mark) over administration causes the above emergency cases of 56,000 examples, and probably have 458 examples to die from acute hepatic failure (Harvard Women ' sHealth Watch, in March, 2006) every year.Result of study (the Lee WM.Hepatology 2004 nearest according to U.S.'s acute hepatic failure research group; 40 (1): as if 6-9), the liver failure relevant with acetaminophen increases.The research worker that is positioned at the University of Washington medical center of Seattle finds, from 1998 to 2003, the ratio of the acute hepatic failure that is caused by acetaminophen was almost turned over one times, has risen to 51% from 28%.The toxicity of acetaminophen is not limited in liver, and may relate to kidney and/or cardiac muscle (JT DiPiro, RL Talbert, GC Yee, GR Matzke, BG Wells, LMPosey (eds) Pharmacotherapy:A Physiological Approach 6 ThEd McGrawHill (New York 2005) pp.133).

The dose limitation of acetaminophen 4 grams every day has been reduced its therapeutic use, because will consume 4 grams (per hour 1 gram) in 16 hours, thereby needs to seek other analgesic in remaining 8 hours of every day.In addition, it is reported, the race of metabolism of acetaminophen and interindividual variation up to 60 times (people such as S.Bridger, BMJ 1998; 316:1724-1725), this causes the height uncertainty for given patient's toxicity dose, thereby makes that the safety features of acetaminophen is more complicated.By weakening toxicity, improved chemical compound can be higher than 4 grams and/or provide bigger safe space that more purposes is provided for any race's patient by acceptable dose.

Found acetaminophen inductive liver toxicity depend on the haemoconcentration level of acetaminophen and the time span of contact.Therefore, the label on the acetaminophen packing all indicates the patient not use maximal dose (4000mg/ days) above 10 days, does not take this product treatment pain and surpasses 10 days or be used for the control fever above 3 days, unless so do under physician guidance.Even healthy adult after accepting the 4000mg acetaminophen and reach 14 days every day, the enzyme level of hepatotoxicity raise (Journal Amer.Med.Assoc.296,87-93,2006) also can occur indicating.

Known after administration, about 90% acetaminophen combines with glucosiduronic acid and sulfate radical, and has less than 5% not by metabolism.Remaining～5% acetaminophen in liver by (mainly the being CYP2E1) metabolism of Cytochrome P450 mixed function oxidase system and be converted into N-acetyl 1,4-benzoquinone imines (NAPQI) (JT DiPiro, RL Talbert, GC Yee, GR Matzke, BG Wells, LMPosey (eds) Pharmacotherapy:A Physiological Approach 6 ThEd McGrawHill (New York 2005) pp.133).NAPQI can be by destroying protein with nucleophilicity residue (for example cysteine residues) covalent bond.Glutathion (GSH; The tripeptides that is formed by L-glutamic acid, L-cysteine and L-glycine) help detoxifcation by combining with NAPQI, after using the acetaminophen of toxicity dose, it can be consumed and reach 90%.The concentration of GSH is low in the liver lobule centrocyte can cause lobule centrality hepatic necrosis, its can be fatal (Drug Metabolism andDisposition 31:1499-1506,2003).The adduct of GSH and NAPQI or be excreted in the bile or by mercapturic acid pathway by further metabolism; this approach relates to be removed glutamy and glycine group and cysteine is converted into N-acetylcysteine conjugate (The Journal ofPharmacology and Experimental Therapeutics 294:735-745,2000).

N-acetylcysteine (NAC) is also referred to as acetylcysteine It is a kind of FDA permission at the toxic antidote of acetaminophen, have oral at present and two kinds of dosage forms of intravenous.( Packing plug.Cumberland Pharmaceuticals, Nashville, TN.2004 ratifies March) known NAC can by stimulate glutathion synthetic (by promoting metabolic pathway) with generate nontoxic metabolism of acetaminophen thing and/or by the toxicity of eliminating toxic metabolites prevent or alleviate acetaminophen hepatotoxicity (Goldfrank ' s ToxicologicEmergencies 7 ThEd.New York:McGraw-Hill; 2002,502-506).But, only confirmed that NAC could make hepatotoxicity minimize effectively when the toxicity blood levels of acute contact acetaminophen is used in 8-10 hour.Anaphylactoid reaction (Lynch RM, the Robertson R.Accid Emerg Nurs.2004 of the NAC that intravenous is used have also been reported; 12 (1): 10-5).

Can guarantee to keep normal liver GSH level with cysteine and methionine (methionine can be converted into cysteine by liver cystathionie approach) that suitable amount provides.GSH can also be the transhipment and the storage form (Journal of Nutrition, 127:2135-2141,1997) of cysteine.Found that extracellular methionine is antioxidant (the Metabolic Bases of Inherited Disease 5 with the same strong antagonism intracellular reactive oxygen species of cysteine ThEd, New York:McGraw-Hill; 1982,522-559).Once the methionine oral administration was treated the acetaminophen over administration, and had per 4 hours oral administration 2-5g methionines of patient of hepatic injury risk to reach 10g owing to taking in acetaminophen until accumulated dose to 30; Wherein, initial dose gives in 10 hours behind over administration.Behind the administration methionine, report (Crome P, Vale JA, Volans GN, Widdop B, Goulding R.Lancet.1976 dead and relevant hepatic encephalopathy or other complication do not appear; 2 (7990): 829-30).In Britain, the combination product of acetaminophen (500mg) and methionine (100mg) is arranged It is by keeping the toxicity outbreak that high glutathione level prevents acetaminophen in liver.Methionine in the said preparation comprises L-isomer (human indispensable amino acid) and D-isomer (non-natural) simultaneously.At DE 4327462A1 and Skoglund LA, SkjelbredP.Eur J Clin Pharmacol 1984; 26 (5): described among the 573-7 and bonded cysteine of acetaminophen and acetyl methionine.

Administration third cysteine (L-2-oxo Thiazolidine-4-formic acid, it can be converted into the L-cysteine by 5-oxo-L-prolinase) can cause the increase of intracellular cysteine level, and is proved that can to increase GSH synthetic.It is more more obvious (for example than use the effect that is produced after using acetaminophen to have confirmed to use before using acetaminophen the effect that is produced, using L-2-oxo Thiazolidine-4-formic acid after 30 minutes and can make the level of organizing of GSH reach 6.1 μ mol/g tissue using acetaminophen, then is 5.3 μ mol/g tissues using when acetaminophen was used after 120 minutes; Proceedings of The Natural Academy of Sciences, 79:6246-6249,1982).

Under 0 ℃, to (the S)-2-oxo Thiazolidine-4-formic acid (2g that is stirring; 13.6mmol) add acetaminophen (2g in the light yellow suspension in dry methylene chloride (50mL); 13.2mmol) and TBTU (7g; 21.8mmol), add DIPEA (2.5mL) then.Suspension became transparent light brown solution after 15 minutes, with its stir about 3 hours at room temperature.By TLC monitoring reaction (dichloromethane: methanol (90: 10); TLC silica gel 60F 254(Merck); With UV detects; R fValue, acetaminophen: 0.4, product: 0.5).Water (25mL) cessation reaction is separated the organic layer of light brown with water layer.Water layer is washed with ethyl acetate extraction (2x50mL) and with organic layer water and 10% citric acid (25mL) that merges, also concentrate with dried over sodium sulfate and obtain heavy-gravity brown liquid.The liquid that obtains is obtained 250mg (6.6% yield) light yellow solid shape (S)-4-acetylamino phenyl 2-oxo Thiazolidine-4-formic acid esters with ether (3x25mL) and acetonitrile (2x10mL) washing. 1H?NMR(400MHz，DMSO-d 6)：δ10.02(s，1H)，8.75(s，1H)，7.6(d，2H，J＝8.2Hz)，7.03(d，2H，J＝8.2Hz)，4.8(m，1H)，3.84(m，1H)，3.75(m，1H)，2.02(s，3H)。 13CNMR(100MHz，DMSO-d 6)：δ173.13，170.02，168.26，167.43，153.06，145.21，137.31，121.54，120.75，119.88，114.93，55.48，31.47，23.87，233.68。MS?m/z(APCI)：281(M+H) +。

Embodiment 6: drug compound (II-A) is in external conversion to acetaminophen before the acetaminophen

The chemical compound (II-A) of known quantity is incubated under physiology's temperature with the human plasma sample.In preset time point (0,5,10,15,20,25,30,40, the 60 and 120 minute) aliquot sample that takes a morsel and analyze acetaminophen content.Whether experiment is carried out under 37 ℃ in the human plasma of collecting with the prodrug (15 μ g/mL and 0.3 μ g/mL) of two kinds of variable concentrations, with the kinetics of mensuration metabolic response and taken place saturated in prodrug related enzyme system in the conversion of acetparaminosalol phenol agents.Find just acetaminophen to have occurred rapidly in 0 minute first collected duplicate samples on paper, as illustrated in fig. 1 and 2.

Embodiment 7: drug compound (II-A) is in vivo to the conversion of acetaminophen before the acetaminophen

In rat, studied the acetaminophen prodrug by the conversion of the intravital metabolism of machine to acetaminophen.To above similar, formula (II-A) chemical compound is carried out intravenous administration to experimental animal and draw blood at preset time point about the described experimental design of in vitro study.Acetaminophen content in the analyzing blood is also measured half-life of prodrug.

The pharmacokinetics of the HCl salt of assessment acetaminophen and formula (II-A) chemical compound is to measure the blood plasma acetaminophen concentration that forms after intravenous (IV) administration.Waiting on the mole foundation administration to provide identical with exposure level acetaminophen (25mg/kg) and obtain the characteristics that chemical compound (II-A) transforms to acetaminophen in vivo the HCl salt of acetaminophen and formula (II-A) chemical compound.Experimental animal is the male and female Sprague Dawley in 7 to 8 ages in week Rat (CharlesRiver Laboratories), body weight 220 to 270 grams.From rat, get blood at 7 time points continuously: after the administration 5,15,30 minutes and 1,4,8 and 24 hour.To take from tail venous whole blood sample (300 μ L) and be collected in the micro-container that contains Lithium acid heparin, by centrifugal obtain blood plasma and with blood plasma at-70 ℃ of following freezings until analyzing.The plasma analysis result of acetaminophen content is shown in Fig. 3 and table 1.

Table 1: the acetaminophen pharmacokinetic parameter that chemical compound (II-A) calculates after the administration in rat vein is summarized

*: 25mg/kg acetaminophen molar equivalent; *: all values is all identical

Embodiment 8: the liver protection of acetaminophen prodrug

Study with assessment when the time the potential liver protection that the l-methionine that is discharged by chemical compound (II-A) is provided to the mice oral administration.Select suitable mouse species and measure the time-histories of the inductive hepatotoxicity of acute acetaminophen.Assess hepatotoxicity by the standard blood plasma enzyme labelling (alanine aminotransferase (ALT) and aspartate aminotransferase (AST)) of measuring hepar damnification.

The first step is to determine to show behind the oral administration acetaminophen mouse species of consistent acute hepatic toxicity sign.Swiss Albino and C57BL6 mice have all been carried out research and selected the C57BL6 strain.Then, by using acetaminophen with the dosage of 250mg/kg and collecting the time-histories that blood sample is measured the inductive hepatotoxicity of acute acetaminophen at 8,12 and 24 hours.In all mices, all observed the obvious increase of ALT and AST level at 12 hours time points.Therefore, this time point is used for all subsequently research.Then, measure minimum effective acetaminophen dosage level.Make C57BL6 male mice overnight fasting, then with 170 and the dosage level oral administration acetaminophen of 365mg/kg and after administration, collected blood sample in 12 hours.Because two kinds of dosage all cause the rising of tangible ALT and AST level, selection 170mg/kg acetaminophen is used for research subsequently.

For the l-methionine (167mg/kg) of molar doses such as confirming can prevent the inductive hepatotoxicity of acetaminophen, will wait the l-methionine and the acetaminophen co-administered of molar dose.Observing oral l-methionine does not influence serum AST and ALT level, and still, the l-methionine of molar doses such as co-administered has obviously reduced the increase with AST and ALT in the animal of acetaminophen processing.

At last, compared the acetaminophen of molar dose level and the hepatotoxicity effect of chemical compound (II-A) of waiting.In this research, find that the 170mg/kg acetaminophen has hepatotoxicity, because the increase of AST level in all processing mices, all occurred and the rising of ALT level in about 83% mice, occurred.On the contrary, (357.07mg/kg) shown average A ST and the ALT level AST and the ALT level that are starkly lower than the acetaminophen processed group of the chemical compound (II-A) of molar dose level such as oral administration.Form with chart in Fig. 4 has provided these data.

In order to confirm that contacting with the whole body of acetaminophen that the whole body that is provided with individually dosed acetaminophen contacts for drug compound (II-A) back be suitable, (357mg/kg) or acetaminophen (170mg/kg) to the chemical compound (II-A) of molar doses such as male C57BL6 mice (8 to 12 all ages) oral administration.With these
