event-title.$: DEEMED WITHDRAWAL OF PATENT APPLICATION AFTER PUBLICATION (PATENT LAW 2001)

section.content: The present disclosure provides methods for using CD37-specific binding molecules (such as a CD37-specific SMIP or antibody) in combination with mTOR inhibitors (such as rapamycin and derivatives or analogues thereof) or phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibitors (such as p110delta-specific inhibitors or the like), which can be done concurrently or sequentially, to treat or prevent a B cell related hyperproliferative disease, such as a lymphoma, carcinoma, myeloma, or the like.

CD37 immunization therapy conjoint therapy and uses thereofThe cross reference of related application

The application wherein incorporates the full content of this provisional application into this paper by reference according to the priority that 35U.S.C. § 119 (e) requires No. the 61/114th, 385, the U.S. Provisional Patent Application submitted on November 13rd, 2008.

Statement about sequence table

The sequence table that replaces hard-copies to provide the application to be correlated with textual form, and incorporate this sequence table into this description by reference at this.The title that contains the text of this sequence table is 910180_418PC_SEQUENCE_LISTING.txt.Text file is 324KB, and on November 13rd, 2008 created, and submits to by the EFS-Web electronics simultaneously with the bright book of this book.

Background

Technical field

The disclosure is provided for treating the compositions and the method for B cell disease usually, and more specifically, relate to the use of uniting of CD37 specific binding molecules and mTOR or phosphatidyl-inositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibitor and compositions thereof, they are collaborative playing a role in relevant excess proliferative disease such as the B cell of treatment or prevention such as lymphoma, cancer, myeloma etc.

Association area is described

The human immunity system protects body to avoid the invasion and attack of foreign substance and pathogen usually.An immune component is a bone-marrow-derived lymphocyte, is also referred to as the B cell, and it produces antibody, and described antibody is protected body by the destruction that combines and mediate in some cases foreign substance or pathogen with foreign substance or pathogen.But in some cases, function of immune system may be made mistakes and be caused disease.For example, there be cancer, autoimmune disease and the diseases associated with inflammation that much relates to the uncontrolled propagation of B cell.

Can identify B cell, for example CD37 by the molecule on the cell surface of B cell.CD37 is the albumen of the 40-52kDa of high glycosylation, belongs to the tetratransmembrane family of cell surface antigen, and it is high expressed on the B cell of normal generation antibody, but does not express on pre B lymphocyte or plasma cell.Except that normal B cell, the malignant tumor in nearly all B cell source all is that the CD37 expression is male, comprise chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), non-Hodgkin lymphoma (NHL) and hairy cell (Moore et al., J.Pathol.152:13 (1987); Merson and Brochier, Immunol.Lett.19:269 (1988); And Faure et al., Am.J.Dermatopathol.12:122 (1990)).

Developed number of C D37 specific immunotherapy.The specific IgG l Mus resource monoclonal antibody MB-1 of CD37 is used 131I labelling and test in the clinical trial of treatment NHL (referring to, Press et al., J.Clin.Oncol.7:1027 (1989); Bernstein et al., Cancer Res. (Suppl.) 50:1017 (1990); Press et al., Front.Radiat.Ther.Oncol.24:204 (1990); Press et al., Adv.Exp.Med.Biol.303:91 (1991) and Brown et al., Nucl.Med.Biol.24:657 (1997)).MB-1 antibody deficiency Fc effector function, antibody dependent cellular cytotoxicity (ADCC) for example, and exposed MB-1 antibody can not suppress tumor growth (Buchsbaum et al., Cancer Res.52:6476 (1992)) in the xenograft models in vivo.In addition, have and be connected to the anti-CD37 of another kind of Mus resource monoclonal, the immune conjugate of the amycin of G28-1 (immunoconjugate) is given mice, and be accompanied by amycin in cell, be released and show by internalization (referring to, Braslawsky et al., Cancer Immunol.Immunother.33:367 (1991)).Be called little module immune drug (SMIP TM) product at the test in the mankind at present of the through engineering approaches fusion rotein of CD37 (referring to, for example U.S. Patent Application Publication is No. 2003/0133939 and No. 2007/0059306; PCT announces WO No. 2009/126944).

Although a large amount of research has been carried out in the treatment based on antibody, still need to be used for the treatment of alternative or the improved compositions and the method for B cell associated conditions or disease in the art.

Summary of the invention

The disclosure is provided for uniting uses CD37 specific binding molecules and mTOR or PI3K inhibitor to reduce B cell or the treatment disease relevant with unusual B cytoactive or method, compositions and the test kit of disease.

On the one hand, the disclosure be provided at suffer from or the doubtful individuality of suffering from disease relevant or disease with unusual B cytoactive in reduce the B cell number or treat the method for this disease or disease, comprise with the CD37 specific binding molecules of treatment effective dose and treat the mTOR or the PI3K inhibitor for treating individuality (promptly carrying out administration) of effective dose.Provide as claim 2-20 and other method as herein described.

On the other hand, the disclosure is provided for treating the test kit of non-Hodgkin lymphoma, comprises: (a) the CD37 specific binding molecules of unit dose and (b) mTOR or the PI3K inhibitor of unit dose.Provide as claim 22 and other test kit as herein described.

On the other hand, the disclosure provides compositions, comprises: (a) CD37 specific binding molecules and (b) mTOR or phosphatidyl-inositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibitor.Provide as claim 24-36 and other compositions as herein described.

Accompanying drawing is briefly described

Fig. 1 has shown the joint effect that CAS-024 and rapamycin are grown for the Rec-1 cell.Two kinds of molecules use with same concentrations.

Fig. 2 has shown the joint effect that CAS-024 and rapamycin are grown for the SU-DHL-6 cell.Two kinds of molecules use with same concentrations.

Fig. 3 A and 3B have shown association index (CI) figure of Rec-1 and SU-DHL-6 cell line.The CI value has shown in (A) effect level and the CAS-024 that (B) maps on the average CI of whole effect scope ± 95% confidence interval and the interaction of rapamycin.

Fig. 4 has shown the joint effect that CAS-024 and sirolimus resin are grown for the SU-DHL-6 cell.Two kinds of molecules use with same concentrations.

Phosphoinositide 3-kinase (PI3-kinases or PI3K) is the family of single transduction enzyme in the relevant cell, and they can be with 3 hydroxyl phosphorylations of the inositol ring of phosphatidylinositols (PtdIns or PI).These enzymes are also referred to as phosphatidylinositol-3-kinase.According to primary structure, adjusting and external lipid substrates specificity, phosphoinositide-3-kinases family can be divided into 3 variety classeses: I class, II class and III class (referring to Leevers et al. (1999) Current Op.Cell Biol.11:219).

I class PI3K is responsible for producing phosphatidylinositols 3-phosphate ester (PI (3) P), phosphatidylinositols (3,4)-bisphosphate (PI (3,4) P 2) and phosphatidylinositols (3,4,5)-triguaiacyl phosphate (PI (3,4,5) P 3PI3K is activated by g protein coupled receptor and tyrosine kinase receptor.I class PI3K is by regulating the heterodimer molecule that subunit and catalytic subunit are formed; According to sequence similarity, it is subdivided into IA and IB subclass.IA class PI3K regulates one of p85 α, p55 α, p50 α, p85 β or p55 γ subunit and p110 α by 5, and β or δ catalytic subunit connect and form.Preceding two p110 isotypes (α and β) are expressed in all cells, but p110 δ mainly is expressed in the leukocyte.Existing prompting p110 δ and adaptive immune system parallel evolution.Regulate p101 and catalysis p110 γ subunit and constitute IB type PI3K.

II class PI3K comprises three kinds of catalysis isotypes (C2 α, C2 β and C2 γ), but different with the III class with the I class, and it does not have adjusting albumen.II class PI3K catalysis produces PI (3) P and PI (3,4) P from PI 2C2 α and C2 β express everywhere at body; But the expression of C2 γ only limits to hepatocyte.Some evidence shows: PI3K is similar to the I class, and II class PI3K may be activated by receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK), cytokine receptor and integrin by outside stimulus, and this prompting has effect in cancer, wound healing and insulin signaling transduction.

In certain embodiments, test kit of the present disclosure comprises unit dose or independently CD37 specific binding molecules and the mTOR or the PI3K inhibitor of unit dose of being packaged as separated from each other, is with or without they are carried out administration simultaneously or the explanation of administration in succession.For example, the disclosure test kit that is suitable for treating lymphoma mantle cell can comprise the CD37 specific binding molecules (for example, CD37 specific antibody or CD37 specificity SMIP polypeptide) of the unit dose of packing and the mTOR inhibitor of unit dose respectively.In certain embodiments, test kit can also comprise other therapeutic agent (for example, CD20 specific binding molecules (for example TRU-015, Rituximab, method difficult to understand wood monoclonal antibody or auspicious pearl monoclonal antibody difficult to understand), cytokine, chemotactic factor, somatomedin, chemotherapeutics or radiotherapeutic agents) in another independent container.

In some other embodiment, CD37 specific binding molecules and mTOR or PI3K inhibitor are formulated in together.The preparation that obtains can be packaged in unit dose or the multi-dose container, and can be kept under cryodesiccated (lyophilizing) condition, only need add sterile liquid carrier, for example water for injection before being about to use.

section.content: The invention relates to an ibuprofen and paracetamol aqueous composition with pH of 6.3-7.3 and application thereof. The present invention relates to a process for the preparation of a combination of ibuprofen and paracetamol. The present invention relates to said composition for use as a medicament, in particular for the treatment of pain and/or inflammation, in particular for administration of said composition by intravenous injection.
本发明涉及pH 6.3‑7.3的布洛芬和对乙酰氨基酚水性组合物及其用途。本发明涉及制备布洛芬和对乙酰氨基酚的组合产品的方法。本发明涉及所述组合物用作药物，特别是用于治疗疼痛和/或炎症的药物，特别是用于通过静脉内注射施用所述组合物。

Aqueous formulation comprising paracetamol and brufenTechnical field

Method the present invention relates to be used to prepare the stabilized aqueous preparation for being combined with brufen and paracetamol, utilizes The composition that methods described is obtained, and it is used as the purposes of the medicine for being particularly used to be injected intravenously or be transfused.

For expect utilize for drug administration by injection, particularly intravenous injection or be transfused, be combined with brufen and right Used in the hospital of the stable liquid pharmaceutical formulation of Paracetamol, the present invention is particularly useful.

Introduction

Brufen is the known non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug with analgesia, refrigeration function.Its chemical name is that 2- is (p- Isobutyl phenenyl) propionic acid.It is applied to the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis and osteoarthritis, light to moderate pain and controls Treatment and the treatment of primary dysmenorrhea.

Brufen is difficult to be dissolved in water.Accordingly, it is difficult to develop the formulations such as such as liquid oral or injecting fluid.Improve water-soluble The method of property is using water soluble complex and prepares ibuprofen salt such as sodium salt or salt with amino acid.

Paracetamol (paracetamol), also referred to as acetaminophen (acetaminophen), be known non-opium, Non- salicylic acid analgesia, antipyretic analgesicses.Its chemical name is N- (4- hydroxyphenyls) acetamide.Its respite is with heartburn or acid Property material intake slight hidden pain (aches) and pain (pain) and related to these symptoms have a stomach upset.

Known paracetamol is readily subject to hydrolysis in aqueous.P- amino is formed after acetaminophen water solution Phenol, its own can be degraded into quinone imines, and this is described in the publication of such as J.E.Fairbrother： J.E.Fairbrother,“Acetaminophen”in Analytical Profiles of Drug Substances, Volume 1974,3, the 1-109 pages.The degradation rate of paracetamol increases with the increase of temperature and light.In pH about For 6 when, the speed minimum (K.T.Koshy et al., 1961, J.Pharm.Sci.50, the 116-118 pages).Paracetamol It is also known to be easy to oxidation.Therefore, its stability in aqueous needs to use antioxidant and/or is removed from the aqueous solution Deoxidation.The complexity of the oxygen of water is readily dissolved in due to the toxicity of some antioxidants and/or removing, this is injected intravenously to exploitation Preparation causes extra limitation.Depending on technology used, except deoxidation may need the considerable time.Another drawback is oxygen Changing product causes the formation of color products, so that the aqueous solution is not suitable for treatment use.

Brufen is simply used with many side effects, such as fash, tinnitus, headache, dizziness, sleepy, stomachache, nausea, abdomen Rush down, constipation and heartburn.The side effect can cause patient uncomfortable, and it is bad that medicine can be caused to follow the trail of.Known method be with The other active components complementary with brufen are combined, and preferably allow for the other active components of relatively low-dose brufen.

This area needs to be combined with brufen and paracetamol, especially with suitable intravenous injection form Product.

The pH of the existing preparation in the market of only brufen is for about 7.The pH of Sodium ibuprofen preparation is generally in the range of 7.0-7.4, and be buffering.The pH scopes of brufen lysate (lysate) preparation are 6.8-7.1.In the market is existing right The pH of Paracetamol preparation is for about 5.5-6.0.PH 7 avoids brufen from precipitating, and pH 5.5-6.0 are to paracetamol Favorably, because the hydrolytic degradation of paracetamol is minimum in the pH.In pH 7, the degraded of paracetamol is obvious, And in pH 5.5-6.0, brufen is precipitated.

It is an object of the invention to provide brufen and the combination product (combination of paracetamol Product), the product solves at least one above mentioned problem.Particularly, it is an object of the invention to provide suitable intravenous injection Aqueous form combination product.Combined it is a further object of the present invention to provide brufen/paracetamol is prepared (combination) method.

The content of the invention

The present invention is combined with brufen and paracetamol, the composition that compatibility is improved by providing, and solves Determine at least one above mentioned problem.

In a first aspect, the invention provides waterborne compositions of the manufacture comprising brufen and paracetamol combination Method, comprises the following steps：

A) aqueous solvent of pH 6.0-8.0, preferably 6.2-7.5, more preferably 6.3-7.3 is provided,

B) brufen and paracetamol are dissolved in the aqueous solvent,

C) if desired, pH is adjusted to 6.3-7.3,

D) waterborne compositions combined comprising brufen and paracetamol, pH 6.3-7.3 are derived from.

More specifically, the method for the waterborne compositions that manufacture is combined comprising brufen and paracetamol is wrapped in order Include following steps：The aqueous solvent of pH 6.0-8.0, preferably 6.2-7.5, more preferably 6.3-7.3 is provided, and with group described in every ml Compound meter, 2.8-3.2mg brufens and 9.8-10.2mg paracetamol are dissolved in the aqueous solvent.Obtained The pH of final composition should be between pH 6.3-7.3.Therefore, if necessary, pH is adjusted.

The advantage of the method has been used while overcoming brufen indissoluble and the paracetamol bar sensitive to degraded Part.The product of gained has long term storage stability.

In second aspect, the invention provides waterborne compositions, the aqueous combination for preferably being obtained by the method for the present invention Thing.

More specifically, the invention provides the waterborne compositions comprising brufen and paracetamol, wherein, it is described The pH of composition is 6.3-7.3.

The product of embodiment of the present invention is characterised by that they provide the brufen of the stabilization under the acceptable pH of physiology With the combination of paracetamol.

In the third aspect, the invention provides the medical usage of the present composition.Product of the invention can be advantageously For brufen and paracetamol to be administered simultaneously.Overcome the problem for individually managing both medicines.

In fourth aspect, the invention provides for delivering of the invention, pH 6.3-7.3 brufen and to acetyl ammonia The device of the base phenol aqueous solution.

In this regard, the invention provides by injection or infusion deliver embodiment of the present invention it is waterborne compositions, Device (1) comprising the composition.This device can be syringe or infusion bag.

This device can use at any time, i.e., the water of comprising the pH 6.3-7.3, brufen and paracetamol Solution.It can also be assembled before administration, for mixing independent component.

In preferred embodiments, described device includes：

- at least the first reservoir and the second reservoir (2,3), wherein brufen are contained in the first reservoir (2), to second Acylamino- phenol is contained in the second reservoir (3), and

- for combining the mixed zone (9) of the paracetamol and the brufen before delivery, it is characterised by described Combination is the composition of embodiment of the present invention.

Brief description of the drawings

Fig. 1 depicts several different embodiments a-e of infusion bag 1, used as the example of delivery apparatus of the present invention.

inventionTitles.title: Preparation method of injection for treating upper respiratory infection
一种治疗上呼吸道感染的注射液的制备方法

address.address1: Huaiyin District of Ji'nan City, Shandong province 250000 Ji Qi Road No. 112

section.content: 本发明公开了一种治疗上呼吸道感染的注射液的制备方法，取下述重量配比的主要原料药制备而成：连翘0.4-1.2，板蓝根0.8-1.6，生石膏0.3-0.6，赛金刚0.6-1.0，旱莲草0.6-1.5。该注射液疗效显著，见效快，不会产生耐药性，经临床验证，具有可重复性。

The invention discloses a preparation method of injection for treating upper respiratory infection. The injection is prepared from the following main active pharmaceutical ingredients in parts by weight: 0.4-1.2 parts of fructus forsythiae, 0.8-1.6 parts of radix isatidis, 0.3-0.6 part of raw gypsum, 0.6-1.0 part of henry hemsleya root and 0.6-1.5 parts of eclipta alba. The injection realizes a remarkable curative effect, takes effect quickly, avoids drug resistance and has repeatability according to clinical verification.

A kind of preparation method of the injection treating upper respiratory tract infectionDivisional application, original applying number 2014106536169, applying date 2014.11.18, the injection of title treatment upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method.

Technical field

The present invention relates to traditional Chinese medicine field, particularly relate to a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof.

Background technology

Upper respiratory tract infection refers to the acutely inflamed general name between nasal cavity to throat, is modal infectious disease. These disease four seasons, any age all can fall ill, and by containing the virulent spittle, droplet, or the apparatus through polluting is propagated. Often when Abwehrkraft des Koepers reduces, as caught cold, tired, the situation such as drench with rain, the former virus existed or invaded by the external world, or/and antibacterial, mushrooms out breeding, causes infection. Chang Jifa bronchitis, pneumonia, nasal sinusitis, a few peoples can complicated with acute myocarditis, nephritis, rheumatic fever etc. Upper respiratory tract infection clinical manifestation can be divided into Types Below: one, common cold. Cause for viral infection, be commonly called as " cold ". Onset is relatively anxious, and main manifestations is sniffle, such as sneeze, nasal obstruction, stream clear water sample nasal mucus, it is possible to show as cough, dry pharynx, itching throat or burn feeling even Postnasal drip sense. Two, acute viral pharyngitis and laryngitis. Caused by rhinovirus, adenovirus, influenza virus, parainfluenza virus and enterovirus, respiratory syncytial virus etc. Clinical manifestation is itching throat and burning sensation, and pharyngalgia is inconspicuous. Cough rare. Acute laryngitis mostly is influenza virus, parainfluenza virus and adenovirus etc. and causes, and clinical manifestation is obvious hoarseness, difficulty speaking, can have heating, pharyngalgia or cough, has sore throat and increase the weight of during cough. Three, acute herpetic angina. How to be caused by CA, show as obvious pharyngalgia, heating. It is mainly in summer, is more common in child, occasionally in adult. Four, acute pharyngo conjunctivitis. Mainly caused by adenovirus, Coxsackie virus etc. Show as heating, pharyngalgia, photophobia, shed tears, swallow and conjunctiva is substantially congested. Five, acute pharyngoamygdalitis. Pathogen mostly is Hemolytic streptococcus, is secondly hemophilus influenza, streptococcus pneumoniae, staphylococcus etc. Onset is anxious, and pharyngalgia is obvious, the heat that occurs together, fear of cold, and body temperature is up to more than 39 DEG C. Having a medical check-up and can find pharyngeal obvious hyperemia, antiadoncus, hyperemia, there is yellow purulent secretion on surface. Sometimes with neck submental lymph nodes enlargement, tenderness, and pulmonary haves a medical check-up absence of signs. Six, complication. Small number of patients can complicated with acute sinusitis, otitis media, tracheitis and bronchitis. Upper respiratory tract infection with pharyngitis for performance, some patients can secondary Hemolytic streptococcus cause rheumatic fever, glomerulonephritis etc., small number of patients can intercurrent disease viral myocarditis, should watch out for. Part youngster, owing to there occurs viral myocarditis, causes sudden death, significant. If upper susceptible people occurs that chest is stuffy and should pay close attention to, it is impossible to adopt a casual attitude.

The treatment of upper respiratory tract infection: 1. conventional symptomatic treatment medicine.(1) ipratropium bromide ipratropium bromide spray: placebo-controlled trial proves that, to alleviating watery nasal discharge, sneeze effectively, particularly course of disease early stage begins to use on the 1st day. Main adverse reaction is the band blood streak in 15%～20% patient's mucus tears. (2) pseudoephedrine: act on respiratory mucosa alpha-adrenergic receptor, alleviates nasal mucosa congested, and heart and other peripheral blood vessel alpha-receptor effects is very micro-. Alleviate nasal obstruction, sleep can be improved. Unsuitable prolonged application, is limited for 3～5 days. (3) antihistaminic: first generation antihistamine drug such as chlorphenamine maleate chlorphenamine is effective to minimizing sneeze and rhinorrhea, and old people has prostate hyperplasia, and person is cautious use of. The antihistaminic of non-sedating effect lacks anticholinergic effect, and effect is not affirmed. (4) antipyretic-antalgic agent: may select in heating and muscular soreness, headache. The most frequently used with acetaminophen acetaminophen. Fixed simultaneously use many with the neat husband of inverase should be avoided. Aspirin is applied repeatedly can increase virus output, and it is slight to improve symptom effect, not recommends. (5) anti-tussive agents: generally do not advocate application for protection coughre flex, but play is coughed and can be applied as one sees fit when affecting rest, more with dextromethorphan application. 2. antiviral treatment: influenza and parainfluenza virus, respiratory syncytial virus are had certain inhibitory action by ribavirin virazole, when clinical practice is only limitted to child's lower respiratory infection respiratory syncytial virus. Rhinovirus and other Respiroviruses be there is no effective antiviral drugs at present. 3. antibiotic application. General not should, also without application antibiotic. The research of one placebo is shown in nose larynx flushing thing and cultivates the improvement having the subgroup of streptococcus pneumoniae, hemophilus influenza or moraxelle catarrhalis growth to account for 20% antibiotic therapy display symptom score. Therefore having bacteria planting, the underlying diseases such as in respiratory secretions, granulocyte increases, and the complication such as sinusitis, otitis media occurs, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease COPD and the patient that the flu course of disease surpasses 1 week can suitably apply antibiotic. 4. treatment by Chinese herbs. Treatment by Chinese herbs common cold is effective. With clear temperature electuary. Often bag 15 grams. Every time take after mixing it with water every day 4 key agents of half bag have Folium Isatidis, Folium Mori, Rhizoma Phragmitis and Gypsum Fibrosum etc.

Publication number 1907306A(application number 200610111666.X) Chinese patent literature disclose a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof. The preparation method of this injection is extracted by Ramulus Et Folium Picrasmae medical material alcohol heating reflux, and united extraction liquid reclaims ethanol, is condensed into thick paste, adds ethanol and make dissolving, filter, merging filtrate, extracts feature alkali, and be condensed into thick paste, obtain preparation intermediate; Using this intermediate, routinely preparation process, customary adjuvant, makes required injection in addition. The Chinese patent literature of publication No. CN102319295A (application number 201110284877.4) discloses a kind of medicament treating upper respiratory tract infection, and it is made up by weight of following bulk drugs: Herba Inulae cappae, Herba Pteridis Multifidae, Fructus Forsythiae, Radix et Rhizoma Dysosmatis, Radix Glycyrrhizae, Radix Sophorae Tonkinensis and Radix Isatidis. Application publication number CN103721090A(application number 201210387474.7) Chinese patent literature disclose a kind of Chinese medicine composition for treating upper respiratory tract infection, it is made up of the raw material of following parts by weight: Radix Bupleuri 30-35, Radix Puerariae 10-12, Gypsum Fibrosum 5-10, Radix Isatidis 20-25, Radix Scrophulariae 10-15, Rhizoma Osmundae 20-30, Stigma Maydis 20-35, Rhizoma Imperatae 30-45.

At present, doctor trained in Western medicine mainly adopts symptomatic treatment, there is no specific drug so far, and on the high side, and curative effect is not entirely satisfactory. Life-time service antibiotic can reduce Abwehrkraft des Koepers, causes bacterial resistance, makes the normal flora of human body lack of proper care, can cause secondary infection on the contrary. Traditional herbal mixture compatibility is suitable, can reach the effect for the treatment of both the principal and secondary aspects of a disease. But people often only focus on the research of curative effect, again in addition with empirical for many, and the research demonstrate,proving effect and dose-effect relationship aspect is less, therefore repeatable poor, and clinical expansion is restricted.

Summary of the invention

For the deficiencies in the prior art, it is an object of the invention to provide a kind of injection treating upper respiratory tract infection and preparation method thereof. This injection is evident in efficacy, instant effect, will not produce drug resistance, according to clinical verification, has repeatability.

The technical scheme is that

The injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection, takes off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and is prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.4-1.2, Radix Isatidis 0.8-1.6, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.3-0.6, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.6-1.0, Herba Ecliptae 0.6-1.5.

The injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection, it is preferred that scheme is, takes off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and is prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.6-1.0, Radix Isatidis 1.0-1.3, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.35-0.52, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.7-0.9, Herba Ecliptae 0.8-1.2.

Treatment upper respiratory tract infection injection, it is more preferable to scheme be take off the primary raw material medicine stating weight proportion and be prepared from: Fructus Forsythiae 0.8, Radix Isatidis 1.1, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.42, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.8, Herba Ecliptae 1.1.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 7.5-11 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 35-70 minute, and second time decocts 25-60 minute, and third time decocts 20-50 minute, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 8-16 hour, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste;

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 65-85 DEG C heated and stirred 25-55 minute, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.5-8.0;

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 6%-15% glucose solution, make, containing crude drug in whole 15%-25%, first to use filter paper filtering secondary, filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels again, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product.

Preferably being in that in step (1), amount of water is 8-10 times of medical material gross weight.

Preferably being in that in step (1), first time decocts 40-60 minute.

Preferably being in that in step (1), second time decocts 30-50 minute.

Preferably being in that in step (1), third time decocts 25-40 minute.

Preferably it is in that in step (2), places 10-14 hour.

Preferably being in that in step (3), 0.5% medicinal charcoal is in 70-80 DEG C of heating.

Preferably it is in that in step (3), heated and stirred 30-50 minute.

Preferably it is in that in step (3), the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.8-7.5.

Preferably it is in that in step (4), adds 8%-12% glucose solution.

Preferably it is in that in step (4), makes containing crude drug in whole 18%-22%.

More preferably, in step (1), amount of water is 8.8 times of medical material gross weight.

More preferably, in step (1), first time decocts 50 minutes.

More preferably, in step (1), second time decocts 40 minutes.

More preferably, in step (1), third time decocts 30 minutes.

More preferably, step (2) is placed 12 hours.

More preferably, step (3) adds 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 75 DEG C of heating.

More preferably, heated and stirred 40 minutes in step (3).

More preferably, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 7.2 by step (3).

More preferably, step (4) adds 10% glucose solution.

More preferably, step (4) makes containing crude drug in whole 20%.

The pharmacology of the present invention main raw material of Chinese medicine used is as follows:

Fructus Forsythiae: base: for the dry fruit of Oleaceae plants Fructus Forsythiae. The property of medicine: bitter, is slightly cold. Return lung, the heart, small intestine meridian. Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, dispersing swelling and dissipating binds. For carbuncle, scrofula, acute mastitis, erysipelas, anemopyretic cold, epidemic febrile disease from the beginning of, warm is joined the army, high hot excessive thirst, and coma sends out speckle, pyretic stranguria urine retention.

Radix Isatidis: base: for the dry root of cruciferae isatis. The property of medicine: bitter, cold. GUIXIN, stomach warp. Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, removing heat from blood sore-throat relieving. For maculae caused by violent heat pathogen, crimson tongue is purple dark, mumps, sore throat, scarlet fever, major part pestilence, erysipelas, carbuncle.

Gypsum Fibrosum: be mainly composed of hydrous calcium sulfate. Additionally, still have the ferrum of a small amount of silicic acid, aluminium hydroxide, sulfide and trace, magnesium etc. The property of medicine: pungent, sweet, Great Cold. Attach to the lung and stomach meridians. Function cures mainly: clearing away heat-fire, and relieving restlessness is quenched the thirst, and restrains granulation promoting. Curing mainly: apoplexy cold and heat, heart subinverse gas is frightened to be breathed heavily, xerostomia scorching tongue, it is impossible to breath, hardness and fullness in the abdomen pain, evil removing ghost, puerperium incised wound. Except seasonal epidemic pathogens headache fever of the body, three burnt big heat, skin heat, stagnation of QI in the intestines and stomach, expelling pathogenic factors from muscles by diaphoresis, restlessness accompanied by ascending of QI of only quenching one's thirst, the sudden and violent gas of abdominal distention, pant and swallow heat, also can do bath soup.

Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth.: base: hammer the tuber of melon for cucurbitaceous plant rod into shape. The property of medicine: bitter, puckery, cold. Function cures mainly: heat-clearing and toxic substances removing, pain relieving. Main bacillary dysentery, enteritis, gastritis, pharyngolaryngitis, parotitis, periodontitis, epidemic hemorrhagic conjunctivitis, tonsillitis, high heat, urinary tract infection.

Herba Ecliptae: base: for the herb of dicotyledon medicine feverfew Eclipta prostrata. The property of medicine: sweet, sour, cool. Return kidney, Liver Channel. Function cures mainly: nourishing the liver and kidney, crow palpus teeth consolidating, cooling blood for hemostasis. Main deficiency of the liver and kindey, vertigo and tinnitus, blurring of vision, soreness of the waist and knees, turn white luxated tooth, stranguria caused by overstrain foul leukorrhea, spitting of blood, spits blood, epistaxis, hematuria, dysentery, metrorrhagia, traumatic hemorrhage.

The injection compatibility for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection provided by the invention is scientific and reasonable. In addition, the excellent results of the present invention is also manifested by:

1, instant effect, evident in efficacy;

2, drug resistance will not be produced;

3, price is low, alleviates patient burden;

4, have no side effect, according to clinical verification, there is repeatability.

Detailed description of the invention

Describe technical scheme in detail below in conjunction with embodiment and experimental example, but protection domain is not limited to this.

Embodiment 1 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 30g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.4 part, Radix Isatidis 0.8 part, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.3 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.6 part, Herba Ecliptae 0.6 part.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 7.5 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 35 minutes, and second time decocts 25 minutes, and third time decocts 20 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 8 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste;

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 65 DEG C of heated and stirred 25 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.5;

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 6% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 15%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product.

Consumption: maximum per kilogram of body weight is less than 25 grams (crude drugs), and minimum per kilogram of body weight is not less than 2 grams (crude drugs). Grasping according to the state of an illness, administering mode can use intravenous injection and intramuscular injection.

Embodiment 2 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 20g): Fructus Forsythiae 1.2 parts, Radix Isatidis 1.6 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.6 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 1.0 parts, Herba Ecliptae 1.5 parts.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 11 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 70 minutes, and second time decocts 60 minutes, and third time decocts 50 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 16 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste;

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 85 DEG C of heated and stirred 55 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 8.0;

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 15% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 25%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product.

Model case one: yellow XX, man, 29 years old. Medical history: main cause cough increases the weight of to examine over one day for 3 days. Having a medical check-up: body temperature is normal, swallow red tonsil little, heart rate 75 beats/min, double; two pulmonary respiration sounds are not slightly heard and dry moist rale. Diagnosis: upper respiratory tract infection. Infuse 2 days without being clearly better. Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 15 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time. Using 1 time, cough symptom substantially alleviates. Using twice, all diseases disappear, without other untoward reaction in transfusion, and recovery from illness.

Embodiment 3 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 40g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.6 part, Radix Isatidis 1.0 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.35 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.7 part, Herba Ecliptae 0.8 part.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 8 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 40 minutes, and second time decocts 30 minutes, and third time decocts 25 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 10 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste;

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 70 DEG C of heated and stirred 30 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 6.8;

(4) step (3) gained medicinal liquid is added 8% glucose solution, make containing crude drug in whole 18%, first use filter paper filtering secondary, then filter once with No. 4 sintered glass funnels, in embedding 500 mL of saline bottle, high steam (105 DEG C) sterilizing 1.2 hours, to obtain final product.

Model case two: grandson XX, female, 32 years old. Medical history: before one week, pharyngalgia occurred, generate heat subsequently, the highest 38.5 DEG C, bring down a fever after certainly taking the medicines such as GANMAO CHONGJI. Cough subsequently, few expectorant, pharyngeal discomfort. Take cefradine 5. Cough exacerbation of symptoms, impact sleep. Also cough incessantly daytime from today. After being ill, Stomach in Patients receive can, without Nausea and vomiting, without losing weight. Physical examination: T:37.5 DEG C, P:80 beat/min, R:20 beat/min, BP:125/75mmHg. Breathing smooth-going, superficial lymph knot does not touch enlargement, pharyngeal hyperemia, II ° of enlargement of tonsil. Two lungs kowtow that rhonchus is clear, respiratory murmur is slightly thick, do not hear and dry moist rale. Heart rate 80 beats/min, the rhythm of the heart is neat. Auxiliary examination: WBC:6.2; L:17%; N:78%; RBC:3.86; HB:129; PLT:204; Blood biochemistry and other no abnormality seen. Diagnosis is upper respiratory tract infection. Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 10 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time. Using 1 time, cough symptom is substantially alleviated. Using 2 times, all diseases disappear, without other untoward reaction in transfusion, and recovery from illness.

Embodiment 4 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 50g): Fructus Forsythiae 1.0 parts, Radix Isatidis 1.3 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.52 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.9 part, Herba Ecliptae 1.2 parts.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 10 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 60 minutes, and second time decocts 50 minutes, and third time decocts 40 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

(2) add 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 82% ethanol, be sufficiently stirred for, place 14 hours, filter, filtrate recycling ethanol, is dissolved in water into 1:5 concentration, then adds 95% ethanol and become the medicinal liquid containing 85% ethanol, placing, filter, filtrate normal pressure reclaims ethanol to without ethanol taste;

(3) step (2) gained medicine is added distilled water to 1:1 concentration, add 0.5% medicinal charcoal in 80 DEG C of heated and stirred 50 minutes, cold rear filter paper filtering, the pH 10%NaOH of gained medicinal liquid is adjusted to 7.5;

Model case three: king XX, female, 42 years old. Main suit: heating companioned with headache, watery nasal discharge 5 days. History of present illness: fever occur without obvious inducement before patient's private prosecution 5 days, watery nasal discharge, with headache, town hospital transfusion 3 days without positive effect. Before telling one day, pharyngalgia occurs, increase the weight of gradually, cough but no phlegm. Physical examination: health check-up: T:37.6 DEG C, P:86, R20/min, BP:120/80mmHg. Pharynx rear wall is substantially congested, it is seen that lymph steeps, II ° of enlargement of bilateral amygdala hyperemia. Double; two pulmonary respiration sounds are clear, do not hear and dry and wet rale. Diagnosis is acute upper respiratory tract infection. Use the injection of the present embodiment gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection, intravenous injection, per kilogram of body weight 15 grams (crude drug), every day 1 time. Using 1 time, all diseases disappear, and without other untoward reaction in transfusion, are totally lost, and recovery from illness is left.

Embodiment 5 treats the injection of upper respiratory tract infection, and the primary raw material medicine taking following weight is prepared from (every part takes 50g): Fructus Forsythiae 0.8 part, Radix Isatidis 1.1 parts, Gypsum Fibrosum 0.42 part, Neoalsomitra integrifoliola (Cogn.) Hucth. 0.8 part, Herba Ecliptae 1.1 parts.

The preparation method of the injection for the treatment of upper respiratory tract infection is:

(1) by each crude drug boiling three times, amount of water is 8.8 times of medical material gross weight, and first time decocts 50 minutes, and second time decocts 40 minutes, and third time decocts 30 minutes, merges three decocting liquids, filters, is concentrated into 1:1 concentration in water-bath;

The clinical practice of the injection of test example 1 embodiment 5 gained treatment upper respiratory tract infection: in May ,-2013 in November, 2011,272 example upper respiratory tract infection patients are screened in 6 hospitals, women 150 example, wherein male 122 example, oldest 65 years old, minimum 3 years old of age, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days. It is randomly divided into two groups, experimental group and matched group. Experimental group women 77 example, male 59 example, age 3-65 year, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days. Matched group women 73 example, male 63 example, age 3-65 year, 35.5 years old mean age, course of disease course of disease 2-8 days, average course of disease 2.5 days. Between two groups of patients, the aspect such as sex, age, course of disease compares, and no significant difference (P > 0.05) has comparability. Experimental group uses embodiment 5 products obtained therefrom, consumption: maximum per kilogram of body weight is less than 25 grams (crude drugs), and minimum per kilogram of body weight is not less than 2 grams (crude drugs). section.content: A method of treating Gaucher's disease in a subject in need thereof is provided. The method comprising orally administering to the subject a therapeutically effective amount of recombinant glucocerecbrosidase (GCD) comprised in plant cells, wherein said therapeutically effective amount of GCD corresponds to 1-1920 units/Kg/14 days, thereby treating Gaucher's disease. Also provide unit dosage forms which comprise the glucocerecbrosidase (GCD) comprised in plant cells.

Be used for the treatment of oral unit dosage form of high Xue Shi disease and uses thereofTechnical field

Oral unit dosage form being used for the treatment of high Xue Shi disease (Gaucher disease) and uses thereof is related in some embodiments of the present invention.

Background technology

Be by invasive delivery method for sending the most frequently used method of protein and peptide drug, such as, inject and infuse.Although these are with the Main Patterns of macromolecular drug treatment systemic disease, for patient and doctor, they are also least desirable.The distinct disadvantage of this dosing mode is that patient must accept and observe, and limits the development of most of polymer, but still points out to use the demand of invasive administration approach not seem inessential because of associated cost or inconvenience.As the noninvasive method of systemic delivery medicine, oral administration provides many advantages: convenient and easily use, and has the extensive capacity of absorption surface, naturally get rid of non-activity, non-Metabolite etc.

However, the research of the oral administration of macromolecular drug does not demonstrate gratifying efficiency level, to mate the potentiality in this path.Some obstructions are difficulties of the picked-up of the solid preparations such as lozenge, in gi tract (Gastro-Intestinal Tract, GIT), bioactive macromolecular unstable, in the concentration of the biologically active agent of mucous membrane, and the perviousness of bioactive macromolecule in gastrointestinal membranes.

The oral administration path of biologically active substance is complicated, due at stomach and upper gastrointestinal highly acidity and enzyme liberating, makes bioactive macromolecule before its predetermined destination organization of arrival, is inactivated or destroys.In addition, the effective concentration of bioactive macromolecule suffers from large volume in the gastrointestinal tract and is difficult to realize.Therefore, effectively, the environment that most medicine must be prevented to be degraded and/or to protect it among upper gastrointestinal, then discharges into suddenly small intestine or colon.Various strategy is used in pharmaceutical industry to overcome with the oral of therapeutic macromole (such as protein) or through the relevant difficult problem of enteral administration.These strategies comprise with carrier covalently bound, design coating and formula (such as pH sensitive coating, polymkeric substance and laminated coating, coated encapsulation, Co ntrolled release formula, Bioadhesive Systems and infiltration control delivery system etc.) to avoid active substance to discharge under severe conditions or to make its slow releasing, such as, in stomach and upper gastrointestinal.But, fill a prescription with this and prepare the complicated and expensive process of biologically active agent needs.Bing and application have mucoadhesive and penetration enhancer (salicylate, fat cholate mixed micelle, glyceryl ester, acylcarnitines etc.) to increase mucosal absorption.But part wherein can cause the problem of serious local toxicity, the wearing and tearing of such as local excitation, epithelium layer and tissue inflammation.Other strategies for improving oral delivery comprise biologically active agent mixed protein enzyme inhibitors, such as Trypsin inhibitor,Trasylol (aprotinin), Trypsin inhibitor SBTI (soybean trypsin inhibitor) and amastatin (amastatin).But enzyme inhibitors does not have selectivity, Bing and also suppress endogenous macromole, thus cause less desirable side effect.Therefore, the oral administration methods of current bioactive molecules can not ensure to provide required biologic activity efficiently at destination organization.

High Xue Shi disease is modal lysosomal storage disease (lysosomal storage disorder).It is by a kind of recessive disease (karyomit(e) 1 q21-q31), cause the shortage of glucose cerebroside enzyme (glucocerebrosidase), also referred to as glucose ceramide enzyme (glucosylceramidase), this is a kind of membrane-bound lysosomal enzyme (lysosomal enzyme), its catalysis sheath candy fat glucocerebroside hydrolysis (glucose ceramide, GlcCer) becomes glucose and ceramide.High Xue Shi disease is that it causes the GlcCer in scavenger cell lysosome to accumulate caused by the point mutation of hGCD (human glucose cerebroside enzyme) gene (GBA).The characteristic storage cell of these tools, is called gaucher's cells, is present in liver, spleen and marrow.Relevant clinical symptom comprises serious hepatosplenomegaly, anaemia, thrombopenia and skeleton and degenerates.

Be proposed as a kind of feasible method in generation nineteen sixty to treat lysosomal storage disease with the lysosomal enzyme of exogenous biological activity enzymes extraction disappearance.Since then, various research shows that enzyme replacement therapy may be helpful for the various lysosomal storage disease for the treatment of.Use placenta GCD (CeredaseTM) treatment of purifying with the individuality of 1 type height Xue Shi disease the earliest, or more in the recent period, to recombinate, the GCD (can obtain from Genzyme company, Shireplc company and Protalix Biotherapeutics) produced treats, and is shown as the most successful example.All these medicines connect to be used with intravenous injection.

Patent publication No. WO2004/096978 and WO2007/010533 teaching are with the GCD expression-form of the vegetable cell of natural package, and oral administration treats high Xue Shi disease.

Summary of the invention

According to the one side of some embodiments of the present invention, a kind of method for the treatment of the high Xue Shi disease of individuality in need is provided, described method comprises the treatment significant quantity described individuality Orally administered being included in the restructuring glucose cerebroside enzyme in vegetable cell, the treatment significant quantity of wherein said glucose cerebroside enzyme meets 1-1920 unit/per kilogram/every 14 days, thus treats high Xue Shi disease.

According to the one side of some embodiments of the present invention, a kind of method for the treatment of the high Xue Shi disease of individuality in need is provided, described method comprises the treatment significant quantity described individuality Orally administered being included in the restructuring glucose cerebroside enzyme in vegetable cell, the unit vol of wherein said glucose cerebroside enzyme is 16 times of the total amount of the unit vol being up to intravenous injection glucose administration cerebroside enzyme, thus treats high Xue Shi disease.

According to the one side of some embodiments of the present invention, a kind of method for the treatment of the high Xue Shi disease of individuality in need is provided, described method comprises the treatment significant quantity described individuality Orally administered being included in the restructuring glucose cerebroside enzyme in vegetable cell, wherein said using is performing before the meal or in a light letter meal, so that the pH value in stomach is more than 2, thus treats high Xue Shi disease.

inventionTitles.title: Aqueous polymer dispersions based on N, N-diethylaminoethyl methacrylate, their preparation and use

event-title.$: GRANT OF PATENT OR UTILITY MODEL

section.content: The invention relates to a method for producing an aqueous polymer dispersion by free-radical emulsion polymerization of a monomer mixture containing N, N-diethylaminoethyl methacrylate, to the polymer dispersions obtainable by this method, and to the use thereof.

Based on methylacrylic acid N, the aqueous polymer dispersion of N-diethylamino ethyl ester, its preparation and purposesThe present invention relates to a kind ofly comprise methylacrylic acid N the monomer mixture of N-diethylamino ethyl ester and prepare the method for aqueous polymer dispersion, polymeric dispersions that can obtain through this method and uses thereof through free-radical emulsion polymerization.

DE 1090381 described a kind of with soluble coated composition in the stomach to the method for pharmaceutical dosage form dressing.These comprise 20-80% at least a (methyl) acrylic-amino ester and 80-20% forms the monomeric multipolymer as the insoluble polymer of homopolymer.With regard to the mentioned specific examples of suitable polymerizable amino ester is vinylformic acid and (methyl) vinylformic acid and N, N-dimethylaminoethanol, N, N-DEAE diethylaminoethanol, N, the ester of N-dimethylamino propyl alcohol and N-(hydroxyethyl) morpholine.The suitable comonomer of mentioning is a vinylformic acid, preferred (methyl) acrylic acid lower member ester such as ethyl propenoate, (methyl) methyl acrylate, (methyl) Bing Xisuandingzhi and (methyl) NSC 11786.Preparation is carried out through the solution polymerization in suitable solvent; Exemplary is not described.

DE 1219175 has described a kind of method for preparing the veterinary drug active agent preparation of protecting its rumen fluid of avoiding ruminating animal influence.For this reason, with comprising the N as copolymerization units, the multipolymer of N-dialkyl aminoalkyl (methyl) acrylic amide and the comonomer that is selected from (methyl) propenoate, vinyl cyanide and vinyl aromatic compounds is to these preparation dressings.Think that according to the document multipolymer of N-dialkyl aminoalkyl ester is disadvantageous based on (methyl) vinylformic acid N, because ester group is easy to hydrolysis than amide group in alkaline medium.

DE 2135073 has described the pharmaceutical dosage form that comprises aqueous polymer dispersion and has used coated composition, wherein polymkeric substance by the carboxylic monomer of 10-55 weight % and/or monoalkyl-or the dialkyl aminoalkyl ester group form.Except many other monomers, diethyl aminoethyl methacrylate (DEAEMA) is also mentioned as suitable monomers.Mentioned suitable comonomer is (methyl) acrylic acid lower member ester (preferable methyl methyl acrylate), (methyl) vinyl cyanide, vinyl aromatic compounds, vinylchlorid and vinyl-acetic ester.Preparation is preferably carried out through emulsion feed technology through the aqueous emulsion polymerization.There is not open particular emulsion polymkeric substance based on DEAEMA.

DE 2512238 has instructed to use and has been used to prepare these pharmaceutical dosage forms through spraying drying and provides the drug coating with low residual monomer content to use tackiness agent with the powder of the polymeric dispersions acquisition of dressing solution.About being used for spray-dired dispersion-s, with reference to DE 1090381, DE 1219175 and DE 2135073.

DE 2838278 has described the oral dosage form of ruminating animal and has used dressing, and it is composed of the following components:

A) at least a have an amino film-forming polymer with the 3-14% nitrogen content of at least one alkalescence, its in 24 hours, be dissolved in pH above in 5.5 the cud water-bearing media and

B) at least aly in polymkeric substance, disperse and be selected from C 12-C 32The Al salt of lipid acid, these lipid acid and/or the lyophobic dust of poly carboxylic acid.

Dressing prepares through the solution with an organic solvent.Mentioned suitable polymers is many nitrogenous homopolymer and multipolymer, does not mention their appropriate method of preparation.In the document, in exemplary 29, mentioned 40% methylacrylic acid N, the multipolymer of N-diethylamino ethyl ester, but its preparation method is not described.

GB 1324087 has described the oral dosage form of ruminating animal and has used the dressing polymkeric substance, and it comprises the following component as copolymerization units:

A) at least a (methyl) vinylformic acid N, the N-dialkyl aminoalkyl ester and

B) at least a alefinically unsaturated compounds that is selected from vinyl aromatic compounds and verivate, vinyl ester, (methyl) propenoate and vinyl cyanide.

As proper monomer a) methylacrylic acid N, N-dimethylamino ethyl ester (DMAEMA) and t-butylaminoethyl methacrylate (TBAEMA) disclosed.Think that TEB 3K especially is not suitable for as comonomer b) because it is easy to form too crisp dressing.The suitable polymeric technology of describing is body, suspension, solution and letex polymerization.The multipolymer of exemplary passes through solution polymerization.

WO 2005/055986 and WO 2005/056619 have described the polymkeric substance of the swelling/solubility behavior with pH dependence and the purposes in pharmaceutical dosage form thereof.

WO 00/05307 relates to provides the pharmaceutical dosage form that comprises (methyl) Yodo Sol GH 28 with seed dressing agent and tackiness agent; Said (methyl) Yodo Sol GH 28 comprises that to have the amino monomer of uncle remaining, its objective is simply drying or can further moisture processing.For this reason, the document has been instructed a kind of following method: wherein with the acrylic acid C of (a) (methyl) 1-C 4Ester and the multipolymer, (b) softening agent that comprise (methyl) acrylate monomer of tertiary amine base and (c) HLB be at least that 14 emulsifying agent is mixed together and through fusion, curtain coating, sprawl or spray and prepare seed dressing agent or tackiness agent, wherein multipolymer (a) is that the powder type of 1-40 μ m is introduced with the mean particle size.Thus obtained processing characteristics is owing to providing the granularity that is powder type minimum multipolymer (a).

The purpose that the present invention is based on provides and is suitable as pharmaceutical dosage form with the seed dressing agent and the polymkeric substance that can as far as possible easily prepare and/or prepare and preparation method thereof.Its purpose is that said polymkeric substance has the performance range that meets following condition as much as possible thus: the pharmaceutical dosage form based on these polymeric films should have the solvability that pH relies on dressing; It is characterized in that excellent barrier properties, and/or be suitable for hiding and have the not activeconstituents of joyful taste water vapour; Preparation should be easy as far as possible; Should avoid in process for preparation, carrying out drying and/or other procedure of processing as far as possible.

Shockingly find to comprise the methylacrylic acid N as copolymerization units, the polymeric dispersions of N-diethylamino ethyl ester (DEAEMA) is characterised in that extraordinary performance characteristic at present.Form that also especially can the primary dispersion body based on this monomeric dispersion-s is processed into polymeric film, is used in particular for pharmaceutical dosage form.Also shockingly be can extremely low viscous primary dispersion body be processed into polymeric film thus.

Letex polymerization is at least 8 times according to the present invention at pH and in water-bearing media, carries out.The pH that this means polyblend can not reduce to below the pH8 in the monomer adition process.After monomer added, for example in any post polymerization process, the pH of water-bearing media also can be for being lower than 8 value, but be not less than 7.5.At polymeric dispersions Pd) pH and the resulting polymers dispersion-s Pd of water-bearing media in the preparation process) pH preferably be at least 8.The pH of water-bearing media is preferably 8-10, more preferably 8.5-9.5.Advantageously in polymerization process, pH is maintained in the above-mentioned scope.PH can pH-regulates material such as alkali, acid or buffer reagent are regulated through in polyblend, adding.Yet,, possibly need not to add pH-and regulate material for specific application area.Therefore, the use of salt or salify component for example can cause the film that the included activeconstituents of this paper is had undesirable hypertonicity that produced by dispersion-s.This also is applicable to other salt or salify component such as anionic emulsifier, longer chain fatty acid etc.In many cases, also need not to add pH-and regulate material because the used monomer of the present invention a) (suitable words and other cationic monomer c) combine) and suitable voice band have the emulsifying agent of ionic group to cause the interior pH of required scope.

What be suitable for regulating in polymerization process or subsequently pH is all inorganic or organic bases and acid in principle, especially water-soluble those.The instance of appropriate base is basic metal and alkaline earth metal hydroxides, ammonia and primary amine, secondary amine and tertiary amine such as triethylamine and amino alcohol such as trolamine, methyldiethanolamine, dimethylethanolamine or 2-amino-2-methyl propyl alcohol.The instance of appropriate acid is carboxylic acid such as lactic acid, acetate, Hydrocerol A or tartrate, or mineral acid such as phosphoric acid, tetra-sodium, sulfuric acid or hydrochloric acid.The pH of polyblend can be before the polymerization or during through suitable measuring apparatus, for example confirm through combined electrode.

Used polymerisation medium preferably is merely water.

With regard to the present invention, term alkyl comprises straight chain and branched-alkyl.The instance of suitable short-chain alkyl is straight chain or branching C 1-C 8Alkyl, preferred C 1-C 6Alkyl, preferred especially C 1-C 4Alkyl.These especially comprise methyl, ethyl, propyl group, sec.-propyl, normal-butyl, 2-butyl, sec.-butyl, the tertiary butyl, n-pentyl, 2-amyl group, 2-methylbutyl, 3-methylbutyl, 1,2-dimethyl propyl, 1,1-dimethyl propyl, 2; 2-dimethyl propyl, 1-ethyl propyl, n-hexyl, 2-hexyl, 2-methyl amyl, 3-methyl amyl, 4-methyl amyl, 1,2-dimethylbutyl, 1,3-dimethylbutyl, 2; 3-dimethylbutyl, 1; 1-dimethylbutyl, 2,2-dimethylbutyl, 3,3-dimethylbutyl, 1; 1; 2-trimethylammonium propyl group, 1,2,2-trimethylammonium propyl group, 1-ethyl-butyl, 2-ethyl-butyl, 1-ethyl-2-methyl-propyl, n-heptyl, 2-heptyl, 3-heptyl, 2-ethyl pentyl group, 1-propyl group butyl, n-octyl, 2-octyl group, 3-octyl group, 2-ethylhexyl, 1-propyl group amyl group etc.
