event-title.$: INVENTION PATENT APPLICATION DEEMED WITHDRAWN AFTER PUBLICATION

section.content: The present invention is directed to twice daily sustained release pharmaceutical composition of paracetamol having an immediate release phase of paracetamol and a sustained release phase of paracetamol, said composition having unique and advantageous pharmacokinetic properties and a pharmaceutical composition comprising only a sustained release phase of paracetamol having unique and advantageous pharmacokinetic properties.

Slow release Aceta ElixirInvention field

The present invention relates to the acetaminophen sustained release pharmaceutical composition of twice administration every day, it has releasing mutually of acetaminophen and slow release phase and has unique and favourable pharmacokinetics character.

Background of invention

The present invention relates to contain the pharmaceutical composition of APAP (general acetaminophen by name, acetaminophen and APAP, hereinafter referred to as acetaminophen).Particularly, the present invention relates to slow release Aceta Elixir, it has favourable pharmacokinetics feature.

Acetaminophen be a kind of in prescribed and non prescribed medicine widely used antipyretic analgesic, its normal and other biologically active cpds share as various opiate derivatives.

It is reported, the scope of the elimination half-life of acetaminophen is 1.9-2.5 hour.After the conventional immediate-release tablet formulations of oral dose, the absorption of acetaminophen is by having high bioavailability (80%) and reaching fast maximal plasma concentration (T max30-90 minute) Passive intake characterizes.These characteristics determined the every conventional dosage regimen being administered once for 4 to 6 hours of 1000mg acetaminophen.Although this scheme is acceptable for short term therapy acute pain, for the sub-chronic or chronic pain of long-term treatment, become inconvenient.The prevalence of osteoarthritis (OA) and musculoskeletal disease is relevant to aging to a great extent.Although the available data in the whole world show that 25% of whole pain are headache, arthralgia accounts for 14% of whole pain.This percentage ratio may be with the increase at age corresponding increase become significantly 55% of whole pain in being greater than the crowd of 60 years old.

In arthralgia (being generally chronic disease), drug compliance is the fundamental that reaches best efficiency.Compliance problem is for there being a series of aged patient of the complication of pharmacological treatment that need to be even more important.Acetaminophen slow releasing preparation can be by reducing medicining times and providing more stable blood level (measuring by blood plasma or serum drug level) to improve patient's quality of life.

Because alleviating mild to moderate OA pain effectively, acetaminophen avoided the relevant risk of NSAID (non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug) (NSAID) simultaneously, as the complication of gastrointestinal tract (GI), cardiovascular and kidney and have drug interaction seldom, it is recommended as first-line treatment medicine.Even at OTC (over-the-counter) dosage, regularly use NSAID also may produce significant GI untoward reaction as ibuprofen and aspirin.Aged patient also has the larger danger that serious GI event occurs.

When taking two three times every day, the acetparaminosalol phenolic product that is designed for three administrations every day (tid) by the acetaminophen that contains q.s to produce close to maximum daily dose, i.e. every agreement that contracts a film or TV play to an actor or actress 600mg to 667mg.This product in the whole world with extend sells and is described in US7, in 943,170.US7,943,170 products of describing are the sustained-release double-layer tablet that contains 665mg acetaminophen.These tablets contain 70% acetaminophen and 30% in slow release layer releases the acetaminophen in layer in.Slow release layer in these tablets is provided by the substrate of the mixture that comprises hydroxypropyl emthylcellulose and polyvinylpyrrolidone.

The product of describing in EP-A-305051 (McNeil, Inc) is to contain 650 or the sustained-release double-layer tablet of 667mg acetaminophen.These tablets contain the acetaminophen of releasing shortly the same amount in layer and slow release layer.Slow release layer in these tablets is provided by the substrate of the mixture that comprises hydroxyethyl-cellulose and polyvinylpyrrolidone.McNeil, Inc. the U.S. with extended Relief sells this bilayer tablet.

The people such as Shah are at US5, and the product of describing in 773,031 be acetaminophen slow-releasing granules and the mixture of the immediate-release granules of the acetaminophen of coating not of the polymer coating of the tablet suppressed together.Coating is water penetration, but insoluble or non-pH is dependent, for example a kind of water-insoluble, the coating that non-pH relies on.This patent is not described the release rate profile of acetaminophen.

Also have a lot of other about the disclosing of acetaminophen slow releasing preparation, but seem neither one, solve the problem of this active medicine twice administration every day.Although three administrations every day have remarkable advantage compared to every 4 hours or administration in every 6 hours, preferably twice administration every day is not only conducive to patient compliance but also can within the longer time, maintains the treatment effectiveness that analgesia is controlled.Found that it is very difficult that twice administration every day reaches suitable pharmacokinetic curve (pharmacokinetic profile).Experiment for many years fails to reach required concentration level within the necessary time.

Therefore, this area still needs the preparation for twice administration every day, 12 of a kind of acetaminophen hours dosage regimens for example, and it can reach and maintain treatment effectiveness and reach 12 hours, aptly under stable state.

Accompanying drawing summary

Product, the routine of Fig. 1 a demonstration embodiment 1 release Aceta Elixir and 8-hour delayed release dosage system Panadol the relevant stripping curve (dissolution profile) of biology.

Fig. 1 b shows the relevant stripping curve of biology of embodiment 2 to 6b.

The product of embodiment 1 and the routine of 1000mg dosage of Fig. 2 a demonstration 2000mg dosage release the single dose pharmacokinetic curve of Aceta Elixir under empty stomach state.

Fig. 2 b shows that the product of embodiment 1 of 2000mg dosage and the routine of 1000mg dosage release the Aceta Elixir single dose pharmacokinetic curve under state on the feed.

Fig. 3 a shows the product of embodiment 1 and the 8-hour delayed release dosage system Panadol of 1330mg dosage of 2000mg dosage single dose pharmacokinetic curve under empty stomach state.

Fig. 3 b shows the product of embodiment 1 and the 8-hour delayed release dosage system Panadol of 1330mg dosage of 2000mg dosage single dose pharmacokinetic curve under state on the feed.

Fig. 4 shows that the product of embodiment 1 of every 12 hours administration 2000mg dosage and the routine of every 6 hours administration 1000mg dosage release Aceta Elixir and every 8 hours administration 8-hour delayed release dosage system Panadol 24 hours in multiple dose (stable state) pharmacokinetic curve (the low absorption of * based on 6 hours above colons).

Fig. 5 shows based on IVMS, the predicted treatment effective time of embodiment 1 to 6.TET is for starting the time of effective time to drug effect disappearance of working and become from medicine.

Fig. 6 shows embodiment 2, embodiment 3 and the single dose pharmacokinetic curve of embodiment 4 products under half feed state.

Summary of the invention

The present invention relates to for oral unit dose slow releasing preparation, it is comprising that acetaminophen slow release phase and acetaminophen comprise about 2000mg acetaminophen in releasing the slow releasing preparation of phase, it provides the acetaminophen of therapeutic plasma level in administration descendant, for the single dose characteristics of pharmacokinetics on an empty stomach and under feed state, this blood plasma level is or is greater than at least 3 μ g/ml within the average duration of approximately 10 hours.

In another embodiment, the present invention relates to for oral unit dose slow releasing preparation, it is comprising that acetaminophen slow release phase and acetaminophen comprise about 2000mg acetaminophen in releasing the slow releasing preparation of phase, it provides the acetaminophen of therapeutic plasma level in administration descendant, for the single dose pharmaco-kinetic properties on an empty stomach and under feed state, this blood plasma level is or is greater than at least 4 μ g/ml within the average duration of approximately 8 hours.

In another embodiment, the present invention relates to for oral unit dose slow releasing preparation, it is comprising that acetaminophen slow release phase and acetaminophen comprise about 2000mg acetaminophen in releasing the slow releasing preparation of phase, it provides the acetaminophen of therapeutic plasma level in administration descendant, for the single dose pharmaco-kinetic properties on an empty stomach and under feed state, this blood plasma level is or is greater than at least 5 μ g/ml within the average duration of approximately 6 hours.

In another embodiment of the present invention, slow releasing preparation of the present invention aspect AUC bioequivalence in another preparation, represent that degree of absorption and routine release acetaminophen identical, or compare with 8-hour delayed release dosage system with conventional immediate release formulations, on the basis of dose titration, this slow releasing preparation is all being absorbed on an empty stomach and under feed state well, and relative bioavailability surpasses 90%.

In another embodiment, the present invention relates to the method for the treatment of analgesia or pain in the people of needs, it comprise to described people's administration unit dose according to the acetaminophen slow releasing preparation of embodiment as herein described.

Detailed Description Of The Invention

Definition

Term used herein " PK (pharmacokinetics) " refers to the research of absorption, distribution, metabolism and the excretion of medicine.

Term used herein " PD (pharmacodynamics) " refers to drug level and the pharmacology relation between replying.

Term used herein " stable state " refers to the essentially no fluctuation of plasma concentration curve of given medicine after repeated doses drug-delivery preparation.

Term used herein " dosage form " refers at least one unit dosage form of the present invention, (for example contain separately tablet of 1000mg acetaminophen or a capsules, the acetaminophen of every single dose can be contained in the slow releasing preparation of 2 unit dosage forms herein for twice administration every day, and every day, total intake was 4000mg).

The term of replaceable use used herein " single dose " or " unit dose ", refer to that pharmaceutical preparation and this drug plasma concentration that people patient accepts single dose not yet reach stable state.For the present invention, single dose or unit dose are by two unit dosage forms (, it can include but not limited to tablet, capsule etc.) form, per unit dosage form is containing having an appointment 1000mg slow release acetaminophen, and every single dose or unit dose be about 2000mg slow release acetaminophen altogether.

Term used herein " multiple dose " refers to that people patient accepts this pharmaceutical preparation of at least two dosage (for example, every day the basis of twice on) according to the dosing interval of preparation.Term multiple dose defined herein, the patient who has accepted multiple dose slow releasing preparation of the present invention may reach and maybe may not reach stable state medicine blood plasma level.

Term used herein " on average ", (as geometric mean) except as otherwise noted, otherwise the arithmetic mean of instantaneous value of the pharmacokinetics value that aforementioned pharmacokinetics value representation obtains from patient crowd.

Term " C used herein max" refer to maximal plasma concentration.

Term " C used herein min" refer to after drug administration and the minimum plasma concentration reaching before the second dosed administration.

Term " T used herein max" refer to the time that reaches maximal plasma concentration.

Term " K used herein el" (hour) refer to elimination rate constant.It is the end points slope (terminal slope) (using ln C to map to the time) of serum-concentration/time graph after completing the absorption and distribution phase.Half-life and elimination rate constant are relative to each other according to following equation: T 1/2=0.693/K el.

Term T used herein lagrefer to the time delay before drug absorption starts.This may be because physiologic factor causes as gastric emptying time and intestinal activeness.
